54e6531030636444140071ff_34.t: Racter rapidly taps out a series of combat parameters on his bracer, Koschei responding with clicks and beeps.
From what I understand, the Seoulpa rings very technologically adept, and make heavy use of drones. I think Koschei will prove the superior machine.

54e6531030636444140071ff_36.t: Racter beams, tilting his chin upward in pride.
I'm glad you understand. For progress to take place, data must be gathered, and modules tested in the wild.

54e6531030636444140071ff_51.t: Racter beams, inclining his head in a respectful bow.
Truly, you are a wonderful person. You have my utmost thanks.

54e6531030636444140071ff_67.t: Racter waves a hand in front of his face as if dismissing the idea as obvious.
Of course, of course. It just seems to be taken to such an excess here.

54e6531030636444140071ff_68.t: Thank you. I had begun to think I'd gone mad, to be the only one put off by that much obsequiousness.

54ebb94f306364901b001373_9.t: Racter arches his eyebrows, looking up from his bracer in surprise.

Tsunami, you say? That's a very expensive mercenary company for a mid-level researcher to hire. Even if Garrett had cause to fear for his life due to the Seoulpas, the minimum outlay for a Tsunami team is extremely high.

54ecfca8343061e01b00108f_4.t: Worst you'll get is dead. Worst we'll get is a finger waggle. But so long as that hand is also holding our nuyen, we're in a good position. Can you say the same?

54f4d9223430612012004418_12.t: Racter's eyes gleam. He looks thoroughly entertained.
You'd think he'd know better than to order from here. This is a *seafood* restaurant, after all.

54f4d9223430612012004418_13.t: If he's down here, that means a certain someone is unguarded upstairs.

54f6285b306364140400187c_5.t: Racter doesn't even look up from hisbracer as he taps in commands.
I suppose it can't be helped. Priming Koschei's combat systems now.

54f6285b306364140400187c_13.t: Racter draws himself up straight, puffing his chest out as he raises his voice.
I am DOCTOR RACTER, formerly employed by Grishin-Aviakor. I was the director of drone development for over ten years, and the ghoul and drone you see are part of my latest project.

54f6285b306364140400187c_39.t: Racter draws himself up straight, puffing his chest out as he raises his voice.
I am DOCTOR RACTER, formerly employed by Grishin-Aviakor. I was the director of drone development for over ten years, and the drone you see is part of my latest project.

54f6285b306364140400187c_41.t: Racter plows on, his booming voice cutting the secretary's question in half.

It's a fully autonomous quadrupedal defense and attack drone with integrated fire direction data management, adaptive autosoft parsing, and modular weapons integration. This drone re-defines "bleeding edge." What's more, it has an adaptive experience registry subprogram - to whit, it learns!

54f6285b306364140400187c_43.t: Racter regards the receptions coldly, and curls one corner of his mouth into a sneer.

Put down that I am here to make a sales pitch. If there is any company in this world with an interest in cutting edge combat drones, it should be Ares Macrotechnology. I have a full report on field and stress tests, part time-to-failure, and combat efficacy. And I do not like being delayed.

54fa290d3063643019004546_5.t: Racter grunts softly. When he speaks, he sounds almost sad.

Taylor, how far you've fallen. When we worked together, he'd never have written this kind of limp corporate missive. We all cared enough about our work that we never had to motivate the team like this. He's become a management tool of Ares Macrotech. I doubt there's much left of the passionate young researcher I knew.

54fa290d3063643019004546_14.t: Ten to one, they're still using my old code. It sounds like the same kind of bug I encountered during my early tests in Moscow.
Racter runs a hand through his hair, squinting at the computer screen from over your shoulder.

The problem is that they're trying to give orders to the drones while the drones have prioritized their own desires over those of the end-user. They'll never respond so long as they're in group reflection mode.

54fa290d3063643019004546_17.t: Racter looks a bit crestfallen, and he shakes his head.

I do not expect you to understand, my friend, but trust me when I say that while it may not work for you, it does for me. Koschei is the single most effective solitary drone in the world, when it comes to independent planning and threat control. It got that way through my love and respect for science. It may unnerve you, but it's a very effective process.

54fa290d3063643019004546_19.t: Racter shoots you a quizzical look, as if he didn't understand the question.

I would likely miss any shot I took. I've got poor aim, and Koschei is good at taking cover. Assuming I hit it, however? It would ask me why. If I couldn't explain myself sufficiently, Koschei would protect itself. Of course, I do have a universal kill switch, so that wouldn't happen.

54ff5820306364a01b004921_9.t: Racter taps a few commands on his bracer, and Koschei trains its guns on the ork.
Let's all keep calm, shall we? Accidents can happen.

54ff5820306364a01b004921_20.t: Racter gives you a significant look. He speaks quietly, so that only you can hear.
That key is almost certainly for the private safe where Taylor and Hardingham are keeping the auto-repair circuitry. We need it.

54ff5820306364a01b004921_29.t: Racter glances at his bracer. Simultaneously, Koschei's motors whine into high gear, as if it's preparing for something.

We don't have time for this discussion. The signal strength of the Ares security forces indicates they're closing in on us. I suggest we leave in one group, and discuss this when not under direct threat.

54ff5820306364a01b004921_55.t: Very good. We should leave as soon as possible, though.

54ff5820306364a01b004921_84.t: Racter checks his bracer, lips curling downward.
I can't decrypt most of the radio chatter, but you certainly set off a hornet's nest of activity. Are they close behind you?

54ff5820306364a01b004921_90.t: Racter gives you a significant look. He speaks quietly, so that only you can hear.
I know Taylor and Hardingham. That key is almost certainly for the private safe where they're keeping the auto-repair circuitry. We need to let these runners in so I can get that key.

54ff5820306364a01b004921_119.t: Racter glances at the runners before looking back at you.

I understand, but I have three problems with leaving them out there. First, I won't get my auto-repair circuits. Second, when Ares tortures them, they'll find out it was us and not the Yellow Lotus in here, and the job will be blown. Third, if we leave them to die, word will get out, and we'll stop getting work. Loyalty is incredibly important here in Hong Kong.

54ff5820306364a01b004921_140.t: Racter gives you a significant look. He speaks quietly, so that only you can hear.
That key he used is almost certainly for the private safe where they're keeping the auto-repair circuitry. We need it.

54ff6324306364380e00491d_9.t: Racter peers intently at his bracer as he scans the room with it.
I think that's the last of the security on this floor, but it won't be long before reinforcements arrive. They're sure to notice when their soldiers stop checking in.

54ff6324306364380e00491d_15.t: Racter gives Gobbet a sidelong glance, the corner of his mouth curling up.
Something tells me that the uniform regulations also preclude pet rats from hitching a ride, as well.

5500650e306364980b004921_4.t: Racter taps out a few commands on his bracer, and doesn't even look up when he speaks.
I'm not about to let anyone deny us our prize. If they're smart, they'll try to talk to us. If they're not, they're just another obstacle.

5500650e306364980b004921_8.t: If that's the case, we should prepare for the worst.
Racter taps out a few commands on his bracer, prompting Koschei to make a slight whirring noise as if it were tensing up.
Kindly mentioned other runner teams being after the same laser prototype. If that's what we heard, they're going to bring every soldier in this facility right to us.

5500650e306364980b004921_14.t: Racter busily taps out some commands on his arm bracer. Koschei whirrs and flexes its legs beside him.
I'm seeing a lot of radio traffic. Whatever that blast was, Ares wasn't expecting it. I think we're about to run face-first into another runner team.

550a053a306364fc1b000156_11.t: Glancing up from his bracer for a brief moment, Racter narrows his eyes at Steeltooth.
I've got a miniature tank, armed with cutting edge weaponry. Do you really think I would hesitate to use it on some thugs who were in my way? This is the precise reason I built it!

550a1e62343061b40e00089b_18.t: I think we've found our playground.
Pity we can't raze the place. We'll have to save that for the temple. I suggest we search this office for every opportunity it has to disrupt Wuxing's qi. Should be easy enough.

550b0530306364f8110000d8_17.t: Racter leans over to whisper to you.

It's true that we only need the GPS unit. That said, I'm certain I could fix the prototype up so that we could use it in the field. It's your call, though: we can be good samaritans, or keep the weapon for ourselves.

550b0530306364f8110000d8_61.t: Ahh, here we are! Safely out of the poison gas and ready to make our escape.
Racter claps his hands together excitedly.
*And* we have a laser! What a wonderful development.

55131926306364cc04007eec_0.t: Racter straightens himself up, smoothing out the front of his jacket.
We should make certain to find the auto-repair prototype while we're here.

55131926306364cc04007eec_2.t: Racter shrugs, glancing around the room.
I don't see why not. They'll definitely have stored it somewhere near here.

55240b37306364fc100003a9_5.t: Quite the wardrobe. But an ostentatious display of wealth. How grotesque.

55244c803063647812004d1f_11.t: You're vory v zakone. Thieves. You steal and rob for your living. We're shadowrunners. We KILL people for our living. Which of us do you think will come out on top in this fight?

552454603234376c45004dfa_27.t: What a pity. All of this unearthed history could have been utilized elsewhere to further our knowledge pre-magic eras.
He shoves a hand into his pocket.
No, best not dwell on it. Our operation's begun.

5525b55b30636400170026dc_33.t: Really? What a fascinating and spiritual spin on things.
Racter inclines his head toward Tang.
I'd be interested in hearing more about your philosophy, once we're done with the job. I think I may find your perspective to be very interesting.

55269cb03063648c150026c9_4.t: Curious. The removal of the skin speaks to a deliberate pathology - some manner of serial killer - but the severed limbs seem much more savage. You'd have to be very strong to tear those off.
Racter gestures at the body impassively.
Look, parts of him are missing. That's very curious.

55269cb03063648c150026c9_7.t: Someone with a highly evolved need for ritual murder, I suspect. This manner of pathology is not seen in sane individuals.
Racter gestures at the body impassively.
Look, parts of him are missing. Curious.

55269cb03063648c150026c9_9.t: Racter examines the body without bending over, his expression impassive.

Shallow cuts across the body, possibly entry points for flaying the strips of skin. The limbs seem to have been removed by brute force, as well. Also, parts of him are missing. Trophies for the killer, perhaps?

55269cb03063648c150026c9_21.t: Racter takes his time examining the body, taking small notes on his PDA.
Curious. No subdermal bruising where the skin's been removed. No sign of a struggle. Coagulation of blood and lividity marks a time of death between two and four hours ago.

55269cb03063648c150026c9_23.t: Racter makes a curious noise as he examines the remnants of Tong's face and neck.
His neck's been severed between the 5th and 6th cervical vertebrae. Scoring across the bone indicates a bladed weapon, and a sharp one at that. Doesn't match any of the other wounds.

55269cb03063648c150026c9_24.t: Racter stands and looks you directly in the eye.
If I had to guess, I'd say he was killed with the blow to the back of the neck. Everything else was subsequent damage.

552c087f306364900600298c_4.t: Racter points to several scratches on the floor and in the pillar.
These scratches look like they're from a long bladed weapon like a sword or machete.

552ecb82306364800e007020_3.t: Racter gestures toward one of the other displays. A pair of small cyberdecks sit inside the locked case.
Maybe Magpie took the chips when she left. Then again, if she did that, why did she leave completed decks behind?

552fd5cf306364d01000702b_7.t: Racter seems intrigued by the packaging. He tilts his head, peering at the long list of artificial flavors, colorings, and preservatives.
I'm reasonably certain I could use these noodles as a precursor to some basic explosives. God only knows what it would do to your stomach.

552fd5cf306364d01000702b_9.t: It might be bliss, but... Look, here.
Racter points at a particular line on the ingredient list.

If you ate this along with some painkillers and that awful lemon soda you like so much, you might end up exploding. Be careful about physical activity if you ever mix those three. I don't want to mop your intestines off your cabin's ceiling.

552fd5cf306364d01000702b_14.t: I admit, the long term health implications of that kind of behavior worries me. Severely.
After a moment, Racter purses his lips.
Although... With a neo-appendix and the right kind of nepheritic screen, most of the damage could be mitigated.

552fd5cf306364d01000702b_16.t: Racter's expression is one of wonderment as he surveys the desk.
This desk could probably serve as a testbed for an alien planet's ecology. I shudder to think of the myriad molds and fungi that are growing here.

55355d69306364e4170078bf_7.t: Racter watches you, slowly arcing one brow.
Ahh. An evening repast prepared by whoever is hiding down here. And what do you do? You eat it.

55369fa7323437682800451d_27.t: I was just wondering the same thing.
Koschei's servos whir, as if in anticipation.

554151b23234370831001a80_27.t: Racter stares up at the creature, his jaw hanging open in awe.

554151b23234370831001a80_41.t: Racter stares up at the creature, his jaw hanging open in awe.

554151b23234370831001a80_59.t: Racter turns to face you, wincing.

554151b23234370831001a80_67.t: His gaze traces across the screen.
This terminal isn't password-locked. The display looks corrupted, but I suppose that it might still be usable.

554a769e3063642017006b1f_1.t: Racter glances at his bracer, pulling up a page of notes on Ares Asia Holdings and scrolling through it.
We're looking for a lab between floor fifteen and forty. Everything below fifteen is shopping and recreation, and the residential areas span fourty one to ninety two.

5550ca45306364981f00009c_15.t: Such is the way of most of life. It's up to you to find meaning beyond survival.
Racter glances down the street in the direction Is0bel is staring.
If their ways didn't strike a chord for you, so be it. Make your own way.

5550ca45306364981f00009c_24.t: Racter studies his bracer, scrolling rapidly through page after page of information. When he looks up, he gestures to the left.
Apparently the Whampoan Elders are usually found inside the Whampoa itself. It's a former shopping mall shaped like a boat.

5550ca45306364981f00009c_25.t: I suspect the architect wanted to make a memorable building. Whatever else may be true, they succeeded.

555a5164323437080f00276b_97.t: Racter shoots a backward glance at you.
I must admit, I was expecting something rather... cleverer than that, my friend. Did you expect it to work?

555a5164323437080f00276b_107.t: Racter raises an eyebrow. He looks intrigued.

55a94da3623666741900929c_57.t: I find his sacrifice fascinating. Edward Tsang will be slowly tortured for thousands of years.

55b940633234373838002559_5.t: Koschei scuttles forward eagerly, its pedipalps weaving eagerly before it.

55b940633234373838002559_11.t: We're in the right place, then - the Fortune Engine must be just ahead, hidden away in this complex.

55c38abd323431d40f002f15_7.t: Interesting to be sure. The magical landscape here is violent and unpredictable.

55c38abd323431d40f002f15_19.t: Interesting, to be sure. The magical landscape here is violent and unpredictable.

56002e56306364541f00015b_7.t: What a fascinating structure. I feel quite privileged to be here.

56003fe5626632e015004496_8.t: No, my friend! I have taken it upon myself to lend my time and talents to our gracious host, Captain Utama.

56003fe5626632e015004496_14.t: He lets out a barking laugh.

"Fit in"? Oh, no, my friend... I do not fit in on the Benteng. If anything, the kind of skilled labor that I can provide sets me further apart from those who live here. But standing apart can be a good thing, yes? My skills at fabrication help to reinforce our value to our dear Captain. So long as I'm turning out armor plates, Utama is unlikely to have us tossed into the sea, yes?

56003fe5626632e015004496_15.t: He lets out a low chuckle. The ambient noise in the shop almost completely drowns out the sound of it.

To be honest, I scarcely notice it any more. But now that you've brought it up, it's rather pleasant, isn't it? Sweet without being cloying. Oh, it's toxic as hell, to be sure... but I have never allowed myself to be bothered by such things.

56003fe5626632e015004496_16.t: He runs a hand through his hair.

In any case, it feels good to keep busy between runs. Our gracious host, Captain Utama, has seen fit to avail herself of my services. At present, I'm turning out new engine parts for the Benteng on the lathe. The rest of the machines in the shop are fabricating armor plating to shore up a few weak spots on the hull.

56003fe5626632e015004496_21.t: Indeed. In point of fact, I'm rather enjoying the change of scenery. There is something soothing - almost meditative - in watching sea mines bob to the motion of the waves.

They're really quite lovely, you know. Like enormous sea urchins with shells of rusted iron, pregnant with destructive potential.

56003fe5626632e015004496_23.t: Yes, my friend. A most pragmatic view.
He snatches a butane torch from the desk, flicks it on, and whisks his cigarette through the flame. A plume of gray smoke curls toward the ceiling.

56003fe5626632e015004496_25.t: Yes, my friend. I suppose that I do.

56003fe5626632e015004496_26.t: Yes, yes, you're probably right. But then, life is often full of surprises, is it not?

56003fe5626632e015004496_28.t: A relaxed smile spreads across his face. He absentmindedly fishes a cigarette out of his breast pocket.

56003fe5626632e015004496_38.t: Nothing that I cannot step away from. I was just doing a little design work, toying with a few novel concepts.

56003fe5626632e015004496_40.t: He runs a hand through his hair.

56003fe5626632e015004496_48.t: The corner of his mouth lifts into a wry smile.

56003fe5626632e015004496_51.t: I suspect that I'll return to what I was doing before we got press-ganged into working with the HKPF. I will shadowrun for funds and entertainment, and spend my spare hours working on and refining my mechanical counterpart.

56003fe5626632e015004496_54.t: I sincerely doubt it. Koschei is my masterpiece, and I will continue to refine him until I die.

56003fe5626632e015004496_56.t: A fair answer. I suppose that we shall have to wait and see for ourselves.

Let us change the subject, eh? The future can wait. I'm sure that there are many more pressing matters that we could discuss.

56003fe5626632e015004496_57.t: I'm pleased to hear that, my friend. Truly, I am.

56003fe5626632e015004496_58.t: Far be it from me to dissuade you... adaptation in the face of changing conditions is a good thing, as it has always been. That said, I hope that your change doesn't take you away from this group.

56003fe5626632e015004496_60.t: And Koschei is the ultimate expression of that mind. He is my masterpiece, the enduring work that I will leave behind.

56003fe5626632e015004496_62.t: For the past week or so, I've been experimenting with synesthesia. Training my brain to associate certain colors with certain tastes, sounds with touch... that sort of thing.

56003fe5626632e015004496_74.t: As a matter of fact, I have. Nothing that I'll be fabricating any time soon, mind you. But I've been exploring a recent obsession, trying to hammer it into something useful.

The concept is somewhat... how to put it... "avant garde," perhaps. But with time, I hope to put it to the test.

56003fe5626632e015004496_77.t: Our encounter with the Yama King was a revelatory experience for me. To see such a being up close... to watch how it moved with my own eyes, to observe the crenelations of its flesh and the sculpted ivory of its crown...

56003fe5626632e015004496_79.t: You're speaking of the nightmares, of course.

56003fe5626632e015004496_82.t: ...Truthfully, I rather like it. She's a lovely old vessel, and well-suited to her role as a floating fortress. And you? How are you enjoying our new - if temporary - home?

56003fe5626632e015004496_88.t: You already know my feelings on how the job ended, and the predicament that we now find ourselves in.

56003fe5626632e015004496_89.t: I won't lie to you, my friend... the Lily Lai extraction tried my patience. I am not a babysitter, and being forced to endure - indeed, to *protect* - a loud-mouthed brat set my teeth on edge.

56003fe5626632e015004496_91.t: Does that surprise you? You already know that I am incapable of feeling remorse.

56003fe5626632e015004496_92.t: The drone stands statue-still, motionless save for the ceaseless weaving of its pedipalps. The red glow from its visual sensors pulses as it focuses on you.

56003fe5626632e015004496_103.t: Would you be surprised if it wasn't? You already know that I am incapable of feeling remorse.

56003fe5626632e015004496_104.t: Yes, my friend. Obviously so. I'm no stranger to violence, but there are some lines that civilized men should not cross.

56003fe5626632e015004496_116.t: I wasn't there, my friend. And on the whole, I'd prefer not to express an opinion on a run that I didn't attend.

5601caa73063640011003c69_10.t: Yes, of course. Nothing to worry about there! Nothing at all.

5601d1fa3063640011003e09_25.t: Koschei clinks its razor-sharp arms against the floor, scraping the metal. Racter speaks.

5602ecf73063643816003192_8.t: Koschei's arms scratch at the air. Racter drops his voice and speaks to you.

5602ecf73063643816003192_14.t: You hear Racter loose a sigh.

5602ee046266328c18001575_21.t: We banished a Yama King. I think that we can handle a few intoxicated bikers.

560304c33063643816003264_13.t: Come now, Doctor. Given the remote access precautions that these labs take, I seriously doubt that exposure is a serious risk. 5604464e3063648823004d0d_15.t: Racter's gaze follows the researchers as they pass through the door.

5604464e3063648823004d0d_66.t: Racter's gaze sweeps the bodies before returning to you.

A productive conversation. Now, how shall we proceed? I'd like to remind you that we have a sterilization countdown in progress, Silver Dream subjects at our backs, and a potential disease outbreak in this facility to contend with.

5604a7a9643661740e0013c2_3.t: He shakes his head agitatedly. Fixes his gaze on you.
But we have... more pressing matters to discuss. Yes. Are you all right, my friend? Did they mistreat you?

5604a7a9643661740e0013c2_33.t: He takes a drag on his cigarette.
None of this makes sense. If we are guests, why have we been caged? And more to the point, why did they come for us at all? The APB on you was lifted, was it not?

5604a7a9643661740e0013c2_39.t: Not prisoners? Ridiculous. They knocked us out and penned us like animals.

5604a7a9643661740e0013c2_43.t: I have heard that such measures are usually reserved for more serious crimes. It's equally abnormal that they failed to question me at the same time. This entire turn of events is quite curious.

5604a7a9643661740e0013c2_48.t: An inconvenience for the both of us, my friend.

It's curious. The police questioned you, but they did not question me. Any interrogator worthy of the name would have collected information from the both of us simultaneously.

5604a7a9643661740e0013c2_65.t: None of this makes sense, my friend.
He produces a cigarette from his breast pocket and dangles it from his lip.
Our captors are dressed like police constables, but this isn't Central Booking. It's a damned impound lot. And gassing you as they did is an unorthodox tactic, to say the least.

5604a7a9643661740e0013c2_75.t: And those of us on board were taken along for the ride.
He takes a drag on his cigarette.
The bastards didn't even give any warning. They just hooked us to a tug, cut away our moorings, and hauled us away from the harbor.

5604a7a9643661740e0013c2_84.t: Someone is coming, my friend. A woman in a red uniform, walking toward the gate.
He removes the cigarette from his lip, drops it to the ground, and crushes it under the heel of his boot.
Be ready, everybody. We're about to have company.

560591ce643661d4160012fc_5.t: Go, my friend. Get us some answers. Once we have information, we can plan our next move.

56098865643661c8160012df_3.t: Tell us, my friend... what is the identity of our captors?

56098865643661c8160012df_47.t: He runs a hand through his hair.

56098865643661c8160012df_72.t: Ah. Probably a reasonable move, considering our employer's temperament.

56098865643661c8160012df_88.t: We are only a part of the equation. Kindly Cheng needs to know what's happening as well.

56098865643661c8160012df_100.t: The corner of the rigger's mouth twitches up into a smirk.

56098865643661c8160012df_113.t: A wry smile creeps onto the rigger's face.

56098865643661c8160012df_141.t: You're back. With answers, I hope. Tell me, my friend... what is the identity of our captors?

560c5be2643661ac15004d4e_59.t: That is a distinct possibility, yes.

560c5be2643661ac15004d4e_72.t: Madam Cheng has soldiers to protect her assets, my friend. We have more important tasks to consider.

560c5be2643661ac15004d4e_84.t: Yes, my friend. That said, they look like they've been out here for a while... they might be able to tell us about the police presence up ahead, if you could get them to talk to us.

560efedf643661880e003a1b_4.t: Racter leaned in to whisper into your ear.

561444d664366150150022f8_5.t: The rigger's lips parted into a thin smile.

561444d664366150150022f8_36.t: The corner of Racter's mouth curled into a smile.

561444d664366150150022f8_58.t: I'm afraid that you're quite mistaken. We aren't customers.

561d66de306364f42300703c_8.t: Hrm. If you're using test subjects to slow us down, then you really are out of options.

561ef7da643661281b000d3d_17.t: Well, my friend... we are here.

56218ac8306364fc18005d11_4.t: I suspect that we've been re-routed by Shiawase's security forces, looking to shunt us into an ambush.

56218ac8306364fc18005d11_21.t: Racter taps a window with his knuckle, glancing back at you.

56218ac8306364fc18005d11_29.t: With the flip of a few switches and the entry of a few override commands, Racter ensures that the car will shift back to its original course.
