We recovered this at the scene. Take a look, and see what we saved you and your team from.

56049c1c643661740e00133d_48.t: I suppose not. But I'm gonna make it up to you... I mean, it's only fair that you learn something in return.
He casts you a sidelong glance.
We recovered this at the scene. Take a look, and see what we saved you and your team from.

55924316303035cc1d0042e3_16.t: He flashes you a brilliant smile, eyes glinting with bemusement. You can just barely detect a faint trace of an accent in his voice.
Handsome Lee's the name. Purveyor of enhanced sensory experiences. I can see that you've got some tales to tell.

55924316303035cc1d0042e3_19.t: His smile flickers briefly. He's got a decent poker face, but you can see that he's rattled.
And, ah... why do you ask?

55924316303035cc1d0042e3_20.t: You're right, I'm not from Heoi.

55924316303035cc1d0042e3_21.t: I was born in Taiwan. I was forced to flee during the Nationalist War. I hear you have a... *slight* accent as well. Seattle?
Emphasis on the 'slight.' The corner of his lip curls smugly - it's your move, apparently.

55924316303035cc1d0042e3_23.t: Handsome Lee suddenly fixes you with his gaze, sizing you up. His face is impassible.

55924316303035cc1d0042e3_24.t: Lee speaks lightly, but he avoids your eyes.
Never been. I'm afraid it's not on my bucket list, either.

55924316303035cc1d0042e3_25.t: No. No, you do not. I wouldn't put Taiwan on anyone's bucket list, either... at least, not since the war broke out. But let us talk business, shall we? I *am* a businessman, after all.

55924316303035cc1d0042e3_26.t: Handsome Lee shakes his head and laughs.
I know that kind of place. But let's not get into it just now, eh? I am a businessman, and I would prefer it if we could stick to business.

55924316303035cc1d0042e3_27.t: He opens his jacket, revealing a myriad of small, bulging pockets sewn into the interior lining.
Can I show you my wares?

55924316303035cc1d0042e3_28.t: My apologies, friend. I intended no offense. Come, let us talk business, shall we? I *am* a businessman, after all.

55924316303035cc1d0042e3_31.t: I enjoy learning about people. Think of me as a student of the human condition. Whatever one might say about Heoi, the people here are certainly *very* interesting.

55924316303035cc1d0042e3_33.t: I suppose not. So let's change the subject, eh? I am a businessman, so let us talk business!

55924316303035cc1d0042e3_34.t: Handsome Lee gives an elegant chuckle.
Ah, and you've got a sense of humor, too. We can certainly use some levity in this place.

55924316303035cc1d0042e3_35.t: The dealer's smile flashes even more broadly.
Naturally. But let us talk business. I'm sure I can find you something to suit your tastes among my wares.

55924316303035cc1d0042e3_36.t: Yes, but it's what I call home. And what's your story?

55924316303035cc1d0042e3_37.t: As it so happens, I am a businessman. Perhaps you'd like to talk business with me?

55924316303035cc1d0042e3_38.t: You must come from a terrible place if you visit Heoi for rest and relaxation.

55924316303035cc1d0042e3_40.t: I hear you have a *slight* accent as well. Let me guess...
Emphasis on the 'slight.' The corner of his lip curls smugly.

55924316303035cc1d0042e3_41.t: Handsome Lee beckons you closer with a languid gesture.
I think I can guess. Stephen Dynamite?
He coolly raises an eyebrow at you.

55924316303035cc1d0042e3_42.t: It was about time for him to contact me. I know his cycles *very* well.
He gives you a knowing nod.
He's one of my most loyal customers.

55924316303035cc1d0042e3_43.t: Interesting. And what does he want from me?

55924316303035cc1d0042e3_45.t: He straightens abruptly from his elegant slouch and juts his chin out.
There was absolutely nothing wrong with my latest creation. It was painstakingly designed to elevate the senses and titillate the spirit - a smooth high that I have indulged in myself.

55924316303035cc1d0042e3_46.t: Now. If the unfortunate Stephen happened to dilute my masterpiece with other, lesser substances, I can hardly be held responsible.
His tone of finality is unmistakable.

55924316303035cc1d0042e3_48.t: He stares at you for a long moment, then reaches into his breast pocket. With a deft motion, he pulls out a small packet and presents it to you.
There is no money - not any more. I have expenses, just as I'm sure that you do. But here, give this to Stephen with my regards.

55924316303035cc1d0042e3_50.t: He cocks his head to the side with a wry smile.
I suppose I have a soft spot for my clients when I know they're down.

55924316303035cc1d0042e3_51.t: The dealer emits a long, drawn-out sigh.

I most certainly did *not* poison him - or anyone else, for that matter. If Stephen is having bad dreams, they're coming from someplace else. I won't claim that my product can cure him of his suffering, but at the very least, it can provide him with some relief.

55924316303035cc1d0042e3_53.t: I told you that I know Stephen well enough to guess when he'll be desperate for another hit.

55924316303035cc1d0042e3_54.t: No. I'm just not surprised to hear from him now, because it was time. But I can't explain these unusual dreams he's having.

55924316303035cc1d0042e3_55.t: He holds the packet out toward you and gives it a shake.
Take this. Give it to him. It should help him, at least in the short-term.

55924316303035cc1d0042e3_57.t: To an extent, yes. Anyway, I make a point of understanding people. It helps the business run smoothly, and I never have to use force.

55924316303035cc1d0042e3_58.t: He lays a slender finger along his aquiline nose.
Never. For one, it's not my style. Second, I know to make an exit before things get too hot.

55924316303035cc1d0042e3_59.t: I simply don't engage in fights I can't win. I've mastered the art of convincing people that it's better having me around - along with my superior abilities in the manufacture of euphoric substances.

55924316303035cc1d0042e3_60.t: I wish my skill could have saved some people in my past, but no matter. It serves me well in the here and now.

55924316303035cc1d0042e3_61.t: Lee's gaze drifts off into the distance briefly, but he shakes himself from his thoughts.
Yes. And some individuals have more regrets than others - like Stephen.

55924316303035cc1d0042e3_62.t: Lee's eyes narrow, and his mouth assumes a pinched quality.
You're right, of course. Saving my own skin is nothing to brag about.

55924316303035cc1d0042e3_64.t: The dealer waggles a finger at you.
Oh, please. We both know I'm not his *friend.* But I'm not a monster. This is my form of assistance, such as it is.

55924316303035cc1d0042e3_65.t: Lee acknowledges you with a nod.
It's a fair question. Stephen's problems won't be resolved overnight. My little gift... simply lets him know that someone cares.
His smile widens, and he tilts his head toward you expectantly.

55924316303035cc1d0042e3_66.t: Well, let's not exaggerate. I strive to treat Stephen as befits a longtime customer.

55924316303035cc1d0042e3_67.t: For you, my friend, it all depends on your long-term cash flow.

55924316303035cc1d0042e3_68.t: I seriously doubt that my withholding drugs from Stephen would do anything but hurt my pocketbook. He's *not* trying to kick his habit. He'd just go to another dealer, so why shouldn't I foster my relationship with the poor man?

55924316303035cc1d0042e3_70.t: Lee favors you with the bright flash of his smile.

Sorry. If I give away any more product, I'll wind up a charity case myself. Be a good man and give that sample to Stephen. I can't claim that it will cure his bad dreams, but it should provide him some modicum of relief.

55924316303035cc1d0042e3_71.t: Of course not. But it will bring relief - and if I'm not mistaken, that's what Stephen is itching for right about now. Correct?

55924316303035cc1d0042e3_72.t: Of course they won't. But they *will* bring relief - and if I'm not mistaken, that's what Stephen is itching for right about now. Correct?

55924316303035cc1d0042e3_75.t: I'm sure that you'd enjoy it. But no, this is for Stephen. Think of it as a consolation gift.

55924316303035cc1d0042e3_76.t: Stephen's not trying to kick his habit, so I'm not going to feel bad about it. Besides, I'd rather that he enjoys my superior product than bog-standard cram-cut-with-glitter from some corner hack.

55924316303035cc1d0042e3_78.t: Why, it's the same concoction as last time - the "poison."

55924316303035cc1d0042e3_81.t: The dealer laughs, and his teeth flash pearly white.
Quite. And while I'll concede that it won't help Stephen in the long term, it should, at least, provide him some modicum of short-term relief. That *is* what he's looking for, isn't it?

55924316303035cc1d0042e3_82.t: And I'll tell you again, the nightmares aren't my fault. The drugs that I sold him aren't even hallucinogens. If he's being haunted by visions, they have nothing to do with me. Still, the sample I'm giving him should provide some short-term relief.

55924316303035cc1d0042e3_83.t: Ah. He wants his money back.
He straightens abruptly from his elegant slouch and juts his chin out.
There was absolutely nothing wrong with my latest creation. It was painstakingly designed to elevate the senses and titillate the spirit - a smooth high that I have indulged in myself.

55924316303035cc1d0042e3_84.t: With the myriad of drugs that Stephen filters through his system, it's almost a honor to be singled out this way. That said, I seriously doubt that I "poisoned" him. Go ahead, though. Tell me what he wants.

55924316303035cc1d0042e3_85.t: He was already "wigged out." Stephen has been a habitual drug user for years.
But all right. Go ahead and tell me... what does dear Stephen want?

55924316303035cc1d0042e3_86.t: He places his hand on his heart in mock indignation.
I am the inventor of much-acclaimed experimental pharmaceuticals. But why split hairs?

55924316303035cc1d0042e3_88.t: He pauses for a moment, mulling it over. Finally, he acquiesces with a nod.
If you like. We've worked together, in a sense... if Stephen hadn't sent you, he'd have sent someone else, and things might not have gone as smoothly. I suppose that I owe you for that.

55924316303035cc1d0042e3_89.t: Handsome Lee's features soften almost imperceptibly.
I grew up in a Taipei ghetto not unlike the Redmond Barrens. Worked my fingers to the bone to get an education.

55924316303035cc1d0042e3_96.t: A shadow crosses Handsome Lee's elegant features.
My family and I were separated in the chaos. I scoured every rendezvous point that we'd ever discussed. I left messages. Nothing.

55924316303035cc1d0042e3_98.t: His jaw clenches for a second. Finally he speaks, somewhat bitterly.
That's true. But I've long since given up. I respect that you've lived a rough life yet still know how to hope.

55924316303035cc1d0042e3_99.t: I had wanted to escape, pretend I hadn't grown up in poverty and squalor. Do you want to know why I chose to live here, in the shadow of the Walled City, rather than seek out more... legitimate prosperity?

55924316303035cc1d0042e3_106.t: Handsome Lee raises his eyebrows at your abruptness. His easy smile returns, though it doesn't reach his eyes.
Come back soon. I'm sure I can find you something to suit your tastes among my wares.

55924316303035cc1d0042e3_107.t: I had wanted to escape, pretend I hadn't grown up in poverty and squalor. Do you want to know why I chose to live here, in the shadow of the Walled City, rather than seek out more... legitimate prosperity?

55924316303035cc1d0042e3_108.t: His jaw clenches for a second. Finally he speaks, somewhat bitterly.
I've done my best to do exactly that. You might even go so far as to say that I've given up. I respect the rough life that you've lived, friend. Do you still know how to hope?

55924316303035cc1d0042e3_109.t: A shadow crosses Handsome Lee's elegant features.
We were separated in the chaos. I scoured every rendezvous point that we'd ever discussed. I left messages. Nothing.

55924316303035cc1d0042e3_110.t: I was a naïve young man with naïve dreams. It's happened before.

55924316303035cc1d0042e3_118.t: The corner of his mouth twitches upward.
Ah... no. Not as such. I was studying chemistry. I was promised a job by a megacorp. I thought I'd found a way out. But that all vanished overnight with the war.

55924316303035cc1d0042e3_121.t: Much obliged. So. Where to begin?
Handsome Lee's features soften almost imperceptibly.
I grew up in a Taipei ghetto not unlike the Redmond Barrens. Worked my fingers to the bone to get an education.

54be84343063641c1f00153f_3.t: Ahh. The little dog who's been sniffing around Neville Ma's affairs.

54be84343063641c1f00153f_4.t: Just so. My servants have been watching you since you arrived. I suspect that you are an evil man, and that you are here to do harm to Neville. And so I came to stop you.

54be84343063641c1f00153f_13.t: She grins at you, displaying a set of sharp-looking teeth.
And what do you intend to do about me, now that you've had this revelation...?

54be84343063641c1f00153f_15.t: She smiles at you with blood-red lips.

An armed conflict in this room would bring security within moments. The Hong Kong Police Force would no doubt arrive shortly thereafter. Is that what you want? It makes no difference to me; I can disappear just as swiftly as I arrived. But you, on the other hand...

54be84343063641c1f00153f_21.t: As for the terms: if I win, you willingly submit to my influence. You become my pawn. And if you win?

54be84343063641c1f00153f_22.t: Wait fifteen minutes for the sun to go down, then come to the roof. We'll settle this there, like gentlemen and ladies.

54be84343063641c1f00153f_28.t: I am far too dignified to hop. Peasants hop. Animals hop. I *stride.*

54be84343063641c1f00153f_29.t: No more foolish questions. I am Ku Feng, and I will tolerate no disrespect.
She folds her arms across her chest.
I suspect that you are an evil man. I think that you are here to do harm to Neville, and I am here to stop you.

54be84343063641c1f00153f_32.t: Oh? And what do you intend to do with this knowledge?

54be84343063641c1f00153f_34.t: Perhaps we can settle this in a more civilized manner. A face-off in a neutral location. Will you accept my challenge?

54bef3b9306364501c001580_0.t: Ku Feng's calm and haughty demeanor dissolves as her eyes grow wild.
Wait, wait... I surrender! Don't kill me!

54bef3b9306364501c001580_1.t: The whole "mistress of the night" thing is just an act. I'm just an accountant that got infected!

54bef3b9306364501c001580_4.t: I was on a business trip to Shanwei last year. I went to a rave, got drunk, and passed out. When I woke up, I was in an alley and someone had done... this... to me.

54bef3b9306364501c001580_11.t: She looks away in shame. Her voice goes flat.
Look, if I'm ever found out, I'll be killed for bounty money. It was either this or get gunned down by a vampire hunter.

54bef3b9306364501c001580_14.t: Her chest hitches. She looks miserable.

I think that's for the best. I mean, how could I explain what I'd become? Can you imagine how ashamed my family would be to find that I'd become this... monster? No, it's better that they think I'm dead.

54bef3b9306364501c001580_18.t: No. You're right. I'm not cut out for this.
She turns to you, a look of misery smeared across her face.
Can we call a truce, maybe? I scratch your back, you... let me live? Please?

54bef3b9306364501c001580_20.t: Yes, yes, anything! Just tell me what you need!

54bef3b9306364501c001580_41.t: A brilliant smile breaks out across her face.
Well, in that case... I accept. Gratefully.

54bef3b9306364501c001580_45.t: It is settled, then. May this be the beginning of a long and fruitful relationship.

54bef3b9306364501c001580_52.t: So, uh... can we call a truce, or something? I scratch your back, you... let me live?

54bef3b9306364501c001580_55.t: She looks away in shame. Her voice goes flat.
I don't even know what I'm going to do with myself now. If I'm ever found out, I'll get killed for the bounty money. This was my only real shot, and I blew it.

54bef3b9306364501c001580_57.t: She looks away in shame. Her voice goes flat.
Look, if I'm ever found out, I'll be killed for bounty money. It was either this or get gunned down by a vampire hunter.

54bef3b9306364501c001580_60.t: Like I said, I'm just an accountant. I never went to Vampire School. What I *did* do was get drunk on a business trip, black out, and wake up in an alley like... this.

54bef3b9306364501c001580_61.t: Ku Feng pulls herself to her feet.
Look... I didn't mean for things to go this far. I don't even know how to fight! I was just trying to scare you into backing down.

54bef3b9306364501c001580_63.t: Ku Feng sniffles loudly, then spits.
To the death, huh? That's the way it's gonna be? Then... so be it!

555e6174323431b40a00673b_7.t: The hooded figure lets the Tsang security officer's body crumple to the floor. She sweeps back her hood and dabs at her lips with her handkerchief.

555e6174323431b40a00673b_8.t: The pleasure is all mine. You're right on time, by the way.
She turns the square of embroidered fabric in her hand and continues to blot the blood off of her lips.
Apologies for the mess. It's like eating soup dumplings... the liquid winds up getting everywhere, no matter how careful you try to be.

555e6174323431b40a00673b_10.t: Why, I'm here to help you, of course. And to bask in the misery of the Walled City.
It's quite intoxicating, you know. The poisonous energy of this place, and of the being at the center of it all. I'm surprised that you can't feel it yourself.

555e6174323431b40a00673b_23.t: She claps her hands together, smiling.
Very good. This is going to be fun.

555e6174323431b40a00673b_24.t: She scowls at you, but nods her head yes.
Very well. I will cover this area - for now. But I can't promise that I'll remain here long.

555e6174323431b40a00673b_26.t: I suppose that will have to do. I will help you.

555e6174323431b40a00673b_28.t: What I want is an honest answer. If I wanted to hear my own thoughts fed back to me, I'd ask one of my thralls. Goodness knows I have enough of them back at the Repulse Bay.

555e6174323431b40a00673b_30.t: Personally, I love it... the slow churn of toxic qi, the aura of doom and despair that clogs the arteries of the Walled City. Maybe it's a vampire thing. Yet another advantage of being undead.

555e6174323431b40a00673b_32.t: She glances down at the body. Gives it a nudge with the toe of her boot.

555e6174323431b40a00673b_36.t: You again. The shadowrunners from the Repulse Bay.
Her expression is ice-cold. She turns the square of embroidered fabric in her hand and continues to blot the blood off of her lips.
We really must stop running into one another.

555e6174323431b40a00673b_37.t: Let's dispense with the pleasantries, shall we? We're both well aware that we don't like one another, so why waste time pretending?

555e6174323431b40a00673b_39.t: Perhaps it does. Perhaps it doesn't. It's still too early to say.

555e6174323431b40a00673b_43.t: No, I don't think that I will.

555e6174323431b40a00673b_47.t: She steps aside to let you pass.
Don't let me keep you. Have fun.

555e6174323431b40a00673b_48.t: She steps aside, practically gliding across the floor.
If you want to descend further into hell, I won't stand in your way.

555fcd8f323431e819001e3a_3.t: Ku Feng shoots you a backward glance.

Tsang security arrived here in force about an hour ago. They've been cordoning off streets and pushing people out ever since. It looks like they're trying to take control of the inner Walled City, but the desperate poor have them outnumbered a thousand to one. The inevitable massacre should begin any second now.

5566624c3234310817000fb3_3.t: We can't go in. Not unless you're actively looking to get hurt.
She waves a hand in the direction of the corralled civilians.
I've dealt with these people - they're not right in the head.

5566624c3234310817000fb3_8.t: ...But if you're set on helping them, I suppose that you could use that fusebox over there to blow the barricade. Who knows? Maybe it'll distract the officers, or something.

5567dd753234317c1b00101d_1.t: I'm afraid that we're going to have to part ways here.
The negative energy of this place has grown a little too strong for my liking.

5567dd753234317c1b00101d_4.t: In any case, this has been a most educational experience. Thank you for letting me be a part of it.

55369fa7323437682800451d_3.t: Well. This is interesting, I must say.
He chuckles - an odd, hollow sound.
I don't recall ever having been in this situation before. Usually I simply awaken to find myself in a strange new environment, wondering what happened.

55369fa7323437682800451d_6.t: He surveys your crew with detached indifference.
Looking at the lot of you, I think it's safe to assume that a violent extraction of information is the next order of business?

55369fa7323437682800451d_9.t: So... you grabbed me at a simsense theater. Target rich environment if you want civilian casualties but my security detail is thinnest at that time...
Clearly, self-preservation is a high priority for you.

55369fa7323437682800451d_10.t: So... you chose to grab me in an intimate moment. I suppose that's wise. Only moderate resistance... but the girl paid for it, didn't she?
Clearly, the preservation of metahuman life isn't a high priority for you.

55369fa7323437682800451d_12.t: So... you chose to take me in an empty parking garage surrounded by corporate security.
Low chance for civilian casualties... clearly, the safety of innocents is a priority for you.

55369fa7323437682800451d_18.t: The silky plastic of his face slides into a smooth smile.
I guess I'll answer your questions... rather... slowly.

55369fa7323437682800451d_23.t: Lee's finger breaks with a loud snap. His face remains rigid and expressionless, though his body tenses and his breathing hitches for a moment. Beyond that, he makes no sound.

55369fa7323437682800451d_25.t: The Plastic-Faced Man's voice remains calm, removed.

There was no need for that. I was joking. Of course I'm going to give you what you want. Although this can be a dangerous profession, I have no intention of absorbing pain for a client if it can be avoided.

55369fa7323437682800451d_29.t: His chin lifts a bit and his tone becomes even more matter-of-fact.
You ask your questions... I'll answer them as efficiently as I can. When we're done, I'll shake hands with a stranger and walk away wondering what just happened.

55369fa7323437682800451d_30.t: Just a professional problem solver who's very very good at his job.
Now, don't waste your time on me. There are bigger questions to answer, don't you think?

55369fa7323437682800451d_31.t: My name is Lee Tai-lung. I was born in 2016 in a suburb of Changde - that's in the Hunan Province of old China. My parents were killed in a food riot around 2021. Or maybe it was 2022...

55369fa7323437682800451d_37.t: Prosperity Tower is Tsang Mechanical Engineering's corporate headquarters. *Prosperity* is also one of Josephine Tsang's pet projects. Which one do you want to know about first?
His voice gets a sing-song tone.

55369fa7323437682800451d_42.t: That's everything I've got on Prosperity Tower - guard stations, jack-points, security protocols...
The makeshift streetlight gleams on his plastic face, reflecting you like a funhouse mirror.

55369fa7323437682800451d_56.t: Lee reaches out a perfectly manicured hand to Is0bel.

55369fa7323437682800451d_59.t: I can respect that. We'll go hands-free. It'll take a little longer but I believe in show-don't-tell.
His eyes become unfocused and he remains frozen nearly a full minute.

55369fa7323437682800451d_60.t: The Plastic-Faced Man takes the PDA from Is0bel and stares down at the screen. His eyes become unfocused and he stands like a statue.

55369fa7323437682800451d_62.t: This is from when I first brought the asset... your father... to Prosperity Tower.
His eyes remain unfocused. Still as a statue.
After I took him from the teahouse on the docks.

55369fa7323437682800451d_64.t: She is clearly advanced in years but access to a nourishing diet and cutting-edge pharmaceuticals afford her the vitality of someone much younger. She speaks directly to the camera. Her tone is hard.

55369fa7323437682800451d_65.t: I warned you to be gentle with him, Mr. Lee.
She looks over at the old man with genuine concern.
He looks as if someone tased him.

55369fa7323437682800451d_66.t: The voice of the Plastic-Faced Man replies.
I assure you, Mrs. Tsang, I was gentle. He walked out of the teahouse under his own power.

55369fa7323437682800451d_67.t: The old man speaks, his voice weary and hoarse.
May I have some water, Mother? My throat feels like it's on fire.

55369fa7323437682800451d_68.t: Yes, of course Edward. I'll have someone bring you some ice chips.

55369fa7323437682800451d_69.t: The Plastic-Faced Man speaks again, his voice lowered.
Your son has apparently been through some sort of ordeal. He appeared demented at times. And he's been mumbling about stopping something. Prosperity, I think.

55369fa7323437682800451d_70.t: Yes, well that won't be happening.
The woman addresses her son, speaking a bit too loudly, as if he is hard of hearing.
We won't be stopping Prosperity, Edward. I want you to get that out of your mind. Do you understand?

55369fa7323437682800451d_72.t: The woman's frowns and shakes her head.

I know, Edward, I know. Those poor people. I've done a lot of good to make up for it since you left - shelters, hospitals, all sorts of good work. And now it's time to do something for *you.* Something I should have done a long time ago, perhaps.

55369fa7323437682800451d_74.t: Raymond speaks dreamily, as if a drug has started its work.
What is this, Momma? What are you doing to me?

55369fa7323437682800451d_75.t: She walks up close to the old man. Strokes his head tenderly. Leans forward to kiss it.
All you can see is failure. You're incapable of seeing the good in what you've done.

55369fa7323437682800451d_77.t: I've been inspired by Mr. Lee here.
The woman turns and looks at the camera.
We're going to do some editing of your memories. To relieve you of your burden.

55369fa7323437682800451d_78.t: Raymond mumbles dreamily, desperately fighting to get the words out.
No, Momma, wait. I've figured out what to do...

55369fa7323437682800451d_80.t: The woman moves closer to the camera.
Your payment will be made according to our agreement.
She turns away, her voice cold.
Once the rest of them are dead.

55369fa7323437682800451d_97.t: I'm hoping that by giving you everything you want, you'll leave me alive when this is all over.
Lee reaches out his ziptied hands to Is0bel. He's perfectly manicured.
Here. Give me that, PDA. I'll show you something.

55369fa7323437682800451d_100.t: I can respect that. We'll go hands-free. It'll take a little longer but I believe in show-don't-tell.
His eyes become unfocused and he remains frozen nearly a full minute.

55369fa7323437682800451d_103.t: This is from when I first brought... your father... to Josephine Tsang.
His eyes remain unfocused. Still as a statue.
After I took him from the teahouse on the docks.

55369fa7323437682800451d_107.t: Yes, of course Edward. I'll have someone bring you some ice chips.
There is genuine concern in her voice. She turns to the camera and her tone hardens.
I warned you to be gentle with him.

55369fa7323437682800451d_109.t: Yes, well that won't be happening.
The woman turns back to her son, who appears older than she. She speaks a bit too loudly, as if he is hard of hearing.
We won't be stopping prosperity, Edward. I want you to get that out of your mind. Do you understand?

55369fa7323437682800451d_111.t: The woman's frowns and shakes her head.

I know, Edward, I know. Those poor people. I've done a lot of good to make up for it since you left - shelters, hospitals, all sorts of good work. And now it's time to do something for *you.* Something I should have done a long time ago, perhaps.

55369fa7323437682800451d_113.t: He speaks dreamily as if a drug has started its work.
What is this, Momma? What are you doing to me?

55369fa7323437682800451d_114.t: She walks up close to the old man. Strokes his head tenderly. Leans forward to kiss it.
All you can see is failure. You're incapable of seeing the good in what you've done.

55369fa7323437682800451d_116.t: I've been inspired by Mr. Lee here.
The woman turns and looks at the camera.
We're going to do some editing of your memories. To relieve you of your burden.

55369fa7323437682800451d_117.t: Raymond mumbles dreamily, desperately fighting to get the words out.
No, Momma, wait. I've figured out what to do...

55369fa7323437682800451d_119.t: The woman moves closer to the camera.
Your payment will be made according to our agreement.
She turns away, her voice cold.
Once the rest of them are dead.

55369fa7323437682800451d_125.t: Not exactly. Prosperity *Tower* is Tsang Mechanical Engineering's corporate headquarters. *Prosperity* is also the secret project her son Edward was working on. Which one do you want to know about first?
His voice takes a sing-song tone.

55369fa7323437682800451d_130.t: That's everything I've got on Prosperity Tower - guard stations, jack-points, security protocols...
The makeshift streetlight gleams on his plastic face, reflecting you like a funhouse mirror.

55369fa7323437682800451d_137.t: The Plastic-Faced Man looks down at his zip tied hands and then slowly surveys his surroundings.

55369fa7323437682800451d_144.t: That's everything I've got on Prosperity Tower - guard stations, jack-points, security protocols...
The streetlight gleams on his plastic face, reflecting you like a funhouse mirror.

55369fa7323437682800451d_147.t: Prosperity Tower is Tsang Mechanical Engineering's corporate headquarters. It's where Josephine is holding your father. Prosperity is *also* the secret project Edward was working on. Which one do you want to know about first?
His voice takes a sing-song tone.

55369fa7323437682800451d_152.t: That's everything I've got on Prosperity Tower - guard stations, jack-points, security protocols...
The streetlight gleams on his plastic face, reflecting you like a funhouse mirror.

55369fa7323437682800451d_158.t: The Plastic-Faced Man looks down at his zip tied hands and then slowly surveys his surroundings.

55369fa7323437682800451d_166.t: I do appreciate it... whoever you are.
The Plastic-Faced Man gives you a little bow and leaves without another word.

55369fa7323437682800451d_175.t: That's everything I've got on Prosperity Tower - guard stations, jack-points, security protocols...
The streetlight gleams on his plastic face, reflecting you like a funhouse mirror.

54d55f873030311411003a6c_0.t: The monk proprietor of this stall regards you coldly as you approach. Before you can even utter a word, you're interrupted.
Nothing for sale here. Not for you. You want to buy something, you get Kindly Cheng to vouch for you first. Until then, screw off.

54d55f873030311411003a6c_1.t: Shen is packing everything up into a series of crates. There is a sense of urgency around the monk, though you do get a nod as you approach.
You want anything, you'd best make it quick. After all the shit that's been going down, I'm clearing out until things settle down.

54d55f873030311411003a6c_7.t: I am Monk Shen. Most people in Heoi call me Spider Shen, on account of the spiders back there. You're not local. Not by a long shot.
It's definitely a statement, not a question.

54d55f873030311411003a6c_8.t: Shen smirks crookedly, two teeth peeking out from between thin lips.
Body language. You're not afraid to look me in the eye, for one. For another, your clothes. Not in fashion, here in Hong Kong.

54d55f873030311411003a6c_9.t: Swords, knives, clubs - I sell it all. I make most of these, but if I can't, I've got friends who can. If you need incense or salves for meditation, I make and sell those, too. And if your joints ache, I can give you acupuncture.
Shen places both palms on the table, leaning over it towards you with a wicked grin.
So. What can I show you?

54d55f873030311411003a6c_11.t: Shen slowly raises an eyebrow, arms folded.
Yeah. Where else would the ancient masters have gotten their legendary swords and spears? Down at the mall?

54d55f873030311411003a6c_15.t: Obviously. You think I'm in Kindly's little haven for no reason? She and Grandfather Wo are on good terms. I don't get in her way, I pay a cut to her, and everybody's happy. Even Wo, because I solve problems for him.

54d55f873030311411003a6c_16.t: Shen raises a balled fist, which suddenly bursts into blue flame. After a moment, it gutters and goes out.
Remember that, if anyone ever gives you something for free. In Heoi, you pay it back with money or blood, but you pay it back regardless.

54d55f873030311411003a6c_17.t: Shen strikes a sudden pose - body low, one fist against a hip while the other is extended in an open palm.

The Five Element Fist style. Water grows wood, which burns to become fire. Fire creates ashen earth, which condenses into metal, et cetera. The forms cycle the five elements, and opposing elements block each other.

54d55f873030311411003a6c_19.t: Shen pulls a tarp away from a nearby lump. The object beneath the tarp is revealed as the door to an Ares Citymaster armored personnel carrier. It's been caved inward by a massive amount of force, and in the dead center of the door is an indentation into which Shen's fist would fit perfectly.
Power comes from focus, and focus comes from practice and meditation. Xing yi quan produces more power than most other forms of kung fu, and applies it in a highly focused way.

54d55f873030311411003a6c_21.t: Shen waves a hand at you dismissively.
No, of course not! Swords like that have to be custom ordered. Only when someone cancels an order do I have one just laying around - and believe me, they get snatched up quick!

54d55f873030311411003a6c_23.t: Shen shakes a finger at you, eyes narrowed.

No. They're mine. I can sell you the things I craft with my hands, or the things I can *do*, but the medicines and poisons I make are my secret. You want those, you apprentice to me. In five years, maybe I show you how to make a poultice, eh?

54d55f873030311411003a6c_24.t: You want to learn, you need patience. You try to learn without patience, all you do ape the masters.
Shen snaps two fingers and points at the cages.
You have to understand them, to truly learn my art. Otherwise, you never become a master. Might as well get a skillsoft.

54d55f873030311411003a6c_27.t: Shen shrugs, and swings an open palm across the table in front of you.
So, you probably have more reason to buy something than my neighbors. And I'm here to sell, so that's good.

54d55f873030311411003a6c_28.t: Why would I? I'm here to sell. You seem like you're here to buy. That's business.
Shen raps two knuckles on the table in front of you.
You want to kill somebody, these'll make it happen.

54d55f873030311411003a6c_29.t: Shen nods in greeting, and raps a fist against the table's surface.
Welcome back. You decide you needed something after all?

54d55f873030311411003a6c_32.t: One moment. I'll be done shortly.
A few last flicks of the wrist see the final credsticks sorted into their respective bin, with the lion's share going to Kindly and Steel Arm Lu.
There. Now, what can I do for you?

54d55f873030311411003a6c_34.t: Shen shrugs, obviously indifferent to the amount the shop's being taxed.

I do. But that's how the system works. I pay Kindly for rent. Steel-Arm Lu gets money because he's my superior. Lucky Ping receives a finder's fee for goods she sends my way, and Grandfather Wo took me in. He gets paid because he's family, and I owe him for getting me off the streets.

54d55f873030311411003a6c_35.t: You join the organization, you have to pay the dues. It's the same as anywhere else, and it beats the hell out of being homeless in Kowloon.
Stuffing the boxes away below the counter, Shen produces a box of assorted needles and inks and begins cataloging them on a battered PDA.

54d55f873030311411003a6c_37.t: Shen leans back against a stack of cages, causing the snakes within to hiss and snap at the glass.

I'm just a Blue Lantern - a footsoldier. I answer to White Ming, who I studied with on Wudang Mountain. He's the 49er, the made man who runs our crew. I don't pay him, because he takes his own cut of what we make.

54d55f873030311411003a6c_39.t: Shen is examining a stack of credsticks. Turning around, the monk nods.
Hello again. What do you need?

54d55f873030311411003a6c_41.t: Shen is busily engaged in a conversation with someone on the other end of a video call. The other individual appears to be a tremendously handsome elf wearing an immaculate - and undoubtedly pricey - custom suit. Shen doesn't appear to notice you..
I'm just saying, if the customs office gives me any more crap about importing those Tiger Snakes, I'm going to be up a creek without paddle.

54d55f873030311411003a6c_42.t: The elf nods, tilting his head back with a mischevious grin.

Leave it to me. I have some friends in the customs house, and between that and their shoddy record-keeping, I'm certain I can get your snakes out of quarantine. It'll take a day, maybe two. If it takes longer than that, it's because someone specifically doesn't like you.

54d55f873030311411003a6c_43.t: At long last, Shen seems to notice you.
Hold on, Yang. I'll call you back. Got a customer here.

54d55f873030311411003a6c_44.t: Putting down the commlink, Shen bows.
Hello again. What can Spider Shen do for you today?

54d55f873030311411003a6c_46.t: He's my lawyer, Yang. *Our* lawyer, I should say, since he's another Blue Lantern, and is part of the same crew.
Shen lifts a thin chinese sword, turning it over so that the light glitters along the egde.
I don't do a lot of things that are legal, in the strictest sense. It helps to have a good lawyer, you know?

54d55f873030311411003a6c_47.t: Well, see? There you go. If you had a good lawyer, that wouldn't be a problem.
Saves you a world of trouble, man.

54d55f873030311411003a6c_48.t: Shen is unmoved by this information.
Well, then your lawyer can make sure your inheritance goes to the right people, eh?

54d55f873030311411003a6c_50.t: Turns out, he'd used a decker contact to make sure to swap a bunch of public recordings, so that traffic cameras would conclusively show us somewhere else and arriving at the last minute.

54d55f873030311411003a6c_53.t: They're not *pets* - they're an investment. I can make antivenom serums from them, or I can use the raw venom to accomplish tasks that would otherwise be too messy and loud.

54d55f873030311411003a6c_54.t: When the situation demands it. Normally, I work for Grandfather Wo exclusively. Sometimes, though, he asks me to do someone else a favor.
Shen produces a needle from below the boat's table, casually flicking it off to the side. Glancing over, you see that it's embedded halfway into a metal crate.
I solve problems. I never know what the problem will be, so I have an array of tools at my disposal.

54d55f873030311411003a6c_56.t: When I'm paid to be, yes. Most of the time, no, but sometimes Grandfather Wo has a problem that needs a permanent solution.
Shen produces a needle from below the boat's table, casually flicking it off to the side. Glancing over, you see that it's embedded halfway into a metal crate.
I can solve those problems. And I prefer to have a wide array of tools to work with.

54d55f873030311411003a6c_57.t: Shen nods in greeting, and raps a fist against the table's surface.
Welcome back. You decide you needed something after all?

54d55f873030311411003a6c_59.t: Leaning against the weapons table, Shen rests one hand atop a glass-covered case. Inside the case is a thin Chinese sword - a jian - with an ornate grip and blade etchings. A small label on the side of the case reads "For White Ming."
Ho there. Come to find a blade, or maybe some ginseng and peony root?

54d55f873030311411003a6c_60.t: You think all I do is sit on this boat and wait for you to show up? Come on. You're Kindly Cheng's pet shadowrunner. Your name's all over Heoi.
You stand out, man. That's a good thing. It means you're becoming somebody, not staying one of the forgettables.

54d55f873030311411003a6c_61.t: Shen stands, twisting left and right to a chorus of cracking vertebrae.
So. What do you need today?

54d55f873030311411003a6c_63.t: Shen runs one hand over the glass top of the case, smiling fondly.
This... Is a masterpiece. Crafted by my own hands, as a gift for White Ming. He's being elevated to a Red Pole.

54d55f873030311411003a6c_65.t: Shen's annoyance is as glass shards in the reply.
Nice is a bouquet of orchids. Nice is a fine meal after a hard day. Nice is pleasant weather while you relax on your boat. This isn't nice. This is a masterpiece.

54d55f873030311411003a6c_69.t: It's more than impressive - it's a damned masterpiece, is what it is!
Shen's annoyance is a jagged edge across the statement.
You think it's easy to make a sword like this? Hell no. Took me four damn months.

54d55f873030311411003a6c_70.t: Shen nods at you in greeting.
What can I do for you?

54d55f873030311411003a6c_72.t: The area behind Shen's table is even more cluttered than usual. Many of the glass cages have been pulled out of their neatly arranged stacks, lying about the floor of the boat like miniature reptilian landmines. Shen is busy checking each cage, marking the contents on a commlink
Be with you in a second... Just seeing if an order is complete.

54d55f873030311411003a6c_73.t: Ball python, check. Asian keelback, check. Mexican vine snake, check. The Indian egg-eating snake's there too... Good. Looks like everything's here.
Shen nods in satisfaction, placing the commlink down on the table in front of you.
Right, then. What can I do for you?

54d55f873030311411003a6c_75.t: I don't! Especially not the venomous ones. But this is different. I'm brokering a deal between a reptile wholesaler and a friend of mine who needs a lot of snakes for his next trid production.
Shen plants a foot atop one cage, smiling broadly.
You ever heard of a man by the name of Dr. Shenyang?

54d55f873030311411003a6c_76.t: Shen blinks, obviously surprised by this news.

Well, how about that. I knew that dirty little dwarf got around, but I didn't think he'd hire freelancers to handle something I could. You must be familiar with what a weird little bastard he is, then.

54d55f873030311411003a6c_77.t: So these snakes are for his next trid movie. I think he's calling it "Martian Snake-Witches of the Fourth Reich." It's some terrible science fiction movie about time travelling wizards from the future.
Shrugging, Shen throws both hands into the air.
God knows where he gets the funding for these ideas. They sure don't sell for crap.

54d55f873030311411003a6c_79.t: Mark my words - whatever he wants you to do, it'll be strange. I have no idea where he comes up with his ideas, but I'm fairly certain he finds them at the bottom of the cheapest bottles of whiskey he can find.
Strange guy, but he pays well.

54d55f873030311411003a6c_81.t: Shen is browsing pictures of what appears to be Thailand on a PDA, one finger lazily scrolling the screen.

54d55f873030311411003a6c_84.t: Shen nods to you before calling out into the depths of the boat.
Make sure the bilge pump is reconnected after you re-oil it. I don't want to slowly sink to the bottom of the river because you decided to cut corners!

54d55f873030311411003a6c_85.t: There is no response from below. Shen simply chuckles, turning around to face you.
They're not the most skilled assistants, but I like being able to keep them fed. What can I do for you?

54d55f873030311411003a6c_87.t: They heard about the triad monk who'll feed kids in exchange for odd jobs. After meeting the rest of my crew, I think they got a little bit infatuated. They think I don't hear it when they play at being Spider Shen and White Ming, but I do.

54d55f873030311411003a6c_89.t: I remember what it was like, to be those kids. Nobody cares if you live or die. So I told myself that when I started to make it, I'd give back to the community. That's how the triads started, you know? Self-protection and community service. If we can't help out our community, we're no better than the megas.

54d55f873030311411003a6c_90.t: Shen sneers at you, lips twisted in scorn.

Who the hell else are they gonna look up out here? Corporate wage slaves? Overbearing, self-important rent-a-cops? At least they stand a chance of joining a triad and making something of themselves. Anything else is a pipe dream.

54d55f873030311411003a6c_92.t: I *am* a bad monk. Sure, I meditate and say the sutras. But that whole vow of non-violence thing's the lesson I keep forgetting.

54d55f873030311411003a6c_93.t: What it comes down to, though, is that I don't care. I didn't become a monk because I was a true believer - I did it because it was a ticket out of the gutter. The skills I learned there, I can use to improve things here.
Shen leans back against the cages, arms folded.

54d55f873030311411003a6c_94.t: You're at the edge of the Walled City. That's the kind of hellhole that gets created when we let the megas get their way. I've had people moralize and preach at me about being a better person. To hell with that.
Shen spits off the side of the boat, scowling.

54d55f873030311411003a6c_97.t: Shen pauses in arraging the stacks of cages as you approach.
Back for more, eh? What can I do for you?

54d55f873030311411003a6c_101.t: Shen gestures toward the holographic display, smiling broadly.
Keep watching. It's about to get good in a few seconds.

54d55f873030311411003a6c_104.t: The recording ends, and Shen straightens up.

I could watch Lucky Ping at work all day. I don't know how she works her magic, but it's a beautiful and terrifying thing to behold. Really glad she's with the Yellow Lotus, and not an enemy syndicate.

54d55f873030311411003a6c_105.t: That's right. She's a Red Pole in her own right, and Steel Arm Lu's cousin. Scary woman, but if she likes you, she'll stick with you through anything.
Shen leans over the display table, palms flat on the surface.
So, what can I do for you?

54d55f873030311411003a6c_107.t: With folded arms, Shen regards you with some suspicion.
We're fairly private people. Generally, when I get asked a question like that, I figure it's because someone's looking for something to use against me.
Shen's expression softens after a moment, however.

54d55f873030311411003a6c_109.t: At first, it was mostly small-time stuff - shell games on street corners, stuff like that. We picked up a new member after about six months, and things started to change - Freedom Tse. Dwarf kid, absolute murder with twin pistols. The kind of focus I can bring to bear in kung fu? That's how he shoots.
His parents named him 'Freedom' and sent him to the UCAS to live with an uncle. Guess they wanted him to be really American or something.

54d55f873030311411003a6c_112.t: If it weren't for Grandfather, I might see about getting White Ming, Steel Arm Lu and Lucky Ping to break away. Maybe start our own thing in turf that's not quite so fought over.
Lifting one hand, palm up, Shen smiles faintly.
But I can't leave him. I owe him everything.

54d55f873030311411003a6c_115.t: Without that kind of loyalty, what kind of people are we? We're no different than the robber barons and corrupt politicians that've made a mess of this world. You stand by your family, and you fight to protect them. That's what matters.

54d55f873030311411003a6c_117.t: That it is. She's been a dancer since she was a kid, but I guess her magic just spontaneously manifested when she was a teenager. She's figured out how to channel it into that kind of...whatever it is you saw. I have no idea how she does it.
Anyway, what can I help you with?

54d55f873030311411003a6c_119.t: Shen raises a hand in greeting as you approach.
Welcome back. What can I get for you, my friend?

54d55f873030311411003a6c_121.t: Shen nods in greeting as you approach.
Good to see you. What can I get you today?

54d55f873030311411003a6c_124.t: Hey there. What do you need?

56003452626632e015004444_1.t: Leung slowly stretches her neck to the side. You hear it crack, and she lets out a small noise of relief and shakes her limbs.
This breeze really sinks into the bones. I feel as stiff as a sea plank.

56003452626632e015004444_2.t: Must be nice to run around all day.
She pauses, and an expression of disgust overtakes her.
Did I really just say that? Gross... I hate puns. Do us both a favor and change the subject, okay?

56003452626632e015004444_5.t: I'd kill for a coffee right now.
She hungrily puffs on her cigarette.
An espresso, with no sugar and extra cream. Maybe a biscuit, too... man, I could murder a biscuit.

56003452626632e015004444_6.t: I hope that's not sarcasm. When it comes to my espressos, nobody's safe.
She pauses for a beat. Her voice lowers.
You think that I'm joking, don't you? I'm not. I broke a man's elbow over an Americano once. Snapped it like a dried-out twig.

56003452626632e015004444_8.t: I broke a man's elbow over an Americano once. Snapped it like a dried-out twig. I'll bet that under the right circumstances, you'd do the same.

56003452626632e015004444_9.t: She chuckles, but the wary expression hasn't left her face. She eyes you up and down.

...Thanks, but no thanks. I may be going through caffeine withdrawals, but I'm not desperate enough to ask a runner for favors. Besides, I can handle myself. I broke a man's elbow over an Americano once. If I have to, I can do it again.

56003452626632e015004444_12.t: The sergeant takes a long drag on her cigarette before meeting your gaze. She looks preoccupied with something.

56003452626632e015004444_13.t: She closes her eyes and allows the smoke to spill from her lips. When she opens them again, they're on you.
What brings you to my corner of the yard, runner?

56003452626632e015004444_14.t: Yeah. I imagine that you are.
She taps her cigarette, spilling ash to the ground.

56003452626632e015004444_15.t: Now that the shock's worn off, you've got questions, huh?
She taps her cigarette, spilling ash to the ground.
All right. Tell me what you wanna know.

56003452626632e015004444_19.t: Smoke streams out of her nose and her mouth.

56003452626632e015004444_21.t: She purses her lips, and her eyes narrow. You're not sure whether she's annoyed or amused.
Funny. Now, if you'll indulge me - why are you here?

56003452626632e015004444_23.t: Don't you have anything better to do? Your job, maybe?
The side of her mouth twists downward.
Look, I'm not here to play games. You want to play, go find a toy. Now tell me what you want.

56003452626632e015004444_24.t: Hey, I'm the watchdog around here. You trying to usurp my position, runner?
Her lips part in a roguish smile.
I hope not, for your sake. You wouldn't like it... there's too much paperwork.

56003452626632e015004444_25.t: That supposed to hurt my feelings, runner?
Look, my job probably looks dull to you. I get that. But any constable worth her salt knows how to stay productive, even in her downtime.

56003452626632e015004444_27.t: Guess you can say that you serve the environment, then.

56003452626632e015004444_28.t: Anyway. Enough joking. If you've got questions for me, fire away.

56003452626632e015004444_29.t: Her gaze sweeps from your head to your toes.

56003452626632e015004444_33.t: Leung taps the butt of her cigarette. The ash, caught in the sea breeze, disappears behind her in a whirl of wind. The breeze lulls briefly, then abruptly changes directions, causing the tip of her cigarette to glow angrily in response.

56003452626632e015004444_34.t: She takes a long drag on her cigarette, her eyes trained on yours.

56003452626632e015004444_35.t: She takes a long drag on her cigarette, her eyes trained on yours.

56003452626632e015004444_37.t: She sweeps her wind-tossed bangs behind her ear, cigarette smoke billowing across her face at the motion.
The criminals that I worked with were all names on documents. Rarely did I have to interact with them in person. I'm just trying to adjust. That's all.

56003452626632e015004444_38.t: I plan on it. *Someone* has to keep you in your place.
She flashes you a wry grin.
Enough about me. What is it that you want, runner?

56003452626632e015004444_39.t: She chuckles. Gives her cigarette another pat.
Could be better. But I'm not complaining - this assignment got me out of Cubicle Row. So, what brings you to my corner?

56003452626632e015004444_40.t: I requested it. Needed to mix things up.
She waves her hand dismissively, cigarette smoke trailing behind it.
Something you need from me, runner?

56003452626632e015004444_41.t: She takes a long drag on her cigarette, her eyes trained on yours.

56003452626632e015004444_54.t: That all you wanted to ask me?

56003452626632e015004444_57.t: Is that all you wanted to ask me? My name?
...If so, I have duties to attend to.

56003452626632e015004444_60.t: I'll admit, did feel some... trepidation for a little while there. News that the inspectors were looking to bring a runner on board made me question things.
She takes a puff of her cigarette. Swishes the smoke over her tongue before exhaling it.
I'm gonna level with you. I *still* doubt the value of your involvement with this task force. But I trust the minds behind this operation, so I'm going with it.

56003452626632e015004444_62.t: She blows a stream of smoke toward you.

Do I look like I'm squirming? I'm just not sure why the Senior Inspectors would waste their resources on someone like you. They could've put all that nuyen toward something more reliable than a contract criminal. A couple more cops, maybe, or a six-pack of drones.

56003452626632e015004444_64.t: ...Yes, we both want the same thing. But for very different reasons. I'll make you a deal, runner. We can work together as long as you don't drag this case down. Just know that if you do, we're gonna have problems.

56003452626632e015004444_65.t: Sharp. Respectable. Eager to see Krait brought to justice.
She gives you a sidelong glance.
...Maybe a little *too* eager, in some cases.

56003452626632e015004444_66.t: But I trust the Senior Inspectors, and I believe in what we're doing here. I'm confident that they'll do everything they can to make this campaign a success.
Smoke trails out of Leung's mouth as she lowers her voice to a mumble.
