With a clatter, he slams his drink onto the counter and heads straight for Henry.

54dbef30653937cc15006dd1_30.t: David nods in response one too many times, his head full of drink.
Right. Right. So long as he isn't spreading any half-truths.

54dbef30653937cc15006dd1_31.t: His feet lock into place to control his swaying. He looks you straight in the eye.
Say, you got any proof of this slander?

54dc1104653937cc1500759b_2.t: David's mouth eases into a contented smirk.

You want to lose face twice in one day? I'm happy to oblige. But not in here. I'll be damned if the Shangri-La bans me for thrashing a worthless crapstain like you on their property. Let's finish this outside. *Now.*

54dce94e653937481b005fb0_1.t: Spit flies from David's mouth, and his words tear through the room.
You little worm. Can't keep up at work, so you try to save face by spreading baseless rumors about me. Pathetic!

5525b2803063644415002063_2.t: Your wish is my command, my friend!

Keita deftly pulls one of the dango sticks out of the cart and drops it onto the grill. A small robotic arm slides out from the cart and begins turning the stick until the balls of rice flour are a toasted brown color. Lifting them from the grill, Keita dips the entire stick in a tub of sticky brown sauce before handing it to you.

5525b2803063644415002063_4.t: Keita leans back, studying you intently. The trid projections from his cart cause his face to be lit in a constantly shifting array of rainbow hues.
So, what brings you to Whampoa Garden, my friend? Somehow I doubt it's just the street food.

5525b2803063644415002063_5.t: I can respect that. Sometimes the tides of life take you to strange places - and few places are stranger than this one! Hah!

5525b2803063644415002063_6.t: Keita shivers, wrapping his arms around his body.
I've been hearing a lot about that. Haven't looked too closely, though - it's just none of my business, you know?

5525b2803063644415002063_17.t: Keita beams, and gestures excitedly at them.
You like them?! I love trid operas - Chinese, Korean, Japanese, Indonesian, it doesn't matter. This way I can watch all of my favorite shows without missing a beat, and I can work at the same time!

5525b2803063644415002063_18.t: Pirated trid is my other business. I rip the streams in the Matrix - tap right into the corporate feeds - and resell them on chip out here.
Keita's face falls a bit, and his enthusiasm wanes.
I wish it could pay the bills, but my food cart's a lot better at that. I don't know why, but most of the other Whampoans seem to like sim over trid.

5525b2803063644415002063_20.t: Eyes twinkling, Keita leans forward in breathless excitement.

Oh, you have no idea! Three hundred and twelve episodes, chronicling a noble mech pilot and the tumultuous love affair he has with a space station governor's daughter! The pathos! The majesty! The Battle of Lagrange One spans five episodes, just by itself.

5525b2803063644415002063_24.t: I saw the crowd down at Tong's Sensory Carnival earlier tonight, but I didn't know the guy very well. I'm a trid fan, he liked the sims. Not a lot of cross-over between us.

5525b2803063644415002063_25.t: Keita shoots you a quizzical look.
I own a street food cart. What makes you think I know anything about armor? Is it made of rice flour or something?

5525b2803063644415002063_26.t: Oh! In that case, I actually *can* help you. Let me see.
He turns the chunk of armor over in his hands, peering at it closely. After a moment, he hands it back.
It says "Renraku kagaku kabushiki-gaisha." It's the Japanese name for Renraku Applied Sciences, the materials research branch of Renraku Asia. Where the hell did you get this, anyway?

5525b2803063644415002063_28.t: I don't know much about the megas, but this seems like some pretty rare armor to find on a serial killer. I don't think off-the-shelf armor has this research mark, and it seems pretty high quality. You'd have to be well-connected to get something like this.

5525b55b30636400170026dc_3.t: Ip crosses his solid chrome arms. Holographic readouts dance constantly over their surface, displaying diagnostic information about their state: operating temperature, servo pressure, and a variety of other minutiae. He looks past you, toward Is0bel.
The prodigal daughter, returned once more. I didn't expect to see you back aboard the Whampoa in my lifetime, Is0bel. When you disappeared, Elder Yetunde was very put out.

5525b55b30636400170026dc_4.t: I'm glad you're still alive. When you chose to walk your own path, I was disappointed. But I still understood why you had to leave.
Ip pauses, tasting the air as he chooses his next words with care.
I hope my lessons have helped you prosper.

5525b55b30636400170026dc_10.t: Ip crosses his solid chrome arms. Holographic readouts dance constantly over their surface, displaying diagnostic information about their state: operating temperature, servo pressure, and a variety of other minutiae. He has the bearing of someone who could handle himself in a fight.
I'm certain you have some questions. Ask, and we'll do our best to tell you what we know.

5525b55b30636400170026dc_12.t: They started two weeks ago. The first to go was Gan. We found him in his apartment, eviscerated...
Ng swallows, grimacing at the painful memory.
He'd been torn apart. His head had been ripped completely off, and most of his skin flayed away. There was so much blood it took us a week to clean out his apartment.

5525b55b30636400170026dc_16.t: Seeing Ng's inability to continue, Ip takes over.
...Inside looked like a bad horror sim. Just like all the other murders. It had to have happened after sundown, because I saw his shop was open when I was on my way to get some noodles for dinner.

5525b55b30636400170026dc_26.t: Elder Ip laughs, quickly stifling it as Ng and Tang give him a dirty look.
I can see why Is0bel is on your team. You and she are very much alike, I suspect.

5525b55b30636400170026dc_34.t: As for me, I serve as the Resplendent Voltage Spike.
That means I shoot people who try to screw with us. It's a fancy title for "head of security."

5525b55b30636400170026dc_52.t: Elder Ip turns the necklace over in his hands, and handing it back after a moment.
That definitely belonged to Magpie. Here, take the key to her shop and look around. Just don't break anything, and don't shut off the servers.

5525b55b30636400170026dc_54.t: Well, for one, she really wanted me removed from the council of Elders. She said I was too prone to violence.
Ip snorts, shaking his head in annoyance.
I guess she never saw all the times I kept the Red Dragon from robbing her blind.

5525b55b30636400170026dc_57.t: Elder Ip turns the necklace over in his hands, and handing it back after a moment.
That definitely belonged to Magpie. Here, take the key to her shop. Just don't break anything, and don't shut off the servers.

5525b55b30636400170026dc_122.t: Porter! Do as you're ordered! We are your Elders!
With that, Ip raises his weapon.

5525b55b30636400170026dc_128.t: Don't you dare talk to me like that, you disgusting beast!
Ip begins to raise his weapon.

56182456306364e415006ab9_0.t: As you move through the lab, monitors all around you spring to life. Commander Garra scowls at you from the flickering screens, a look of severe irritation etched into the lines around his eyes.
Your little romp through Shiawase property has gone on long enough. Time's up, shadowrunner.

56182456306364e415006ab9_3.t: You really pissed all over this complex, runner.
The commander spits onto the steel floor.
Made an awful mess of everything that you've come across down here. That's a lot of money you've cost us.

56182456306364e415006ab9_4.t: He smiles, revealing a set of crooked teeth.
But now I've finally got you. No way out but through me and mine. By the time I'm done with you, you'll look worse than those freaks in the cryotanks.

56182456306364e415006ab9_5.t: He laughs, a low and raspy sound.
Says the man who rang our doorbell and murdered the greeting party. I expect that you won't be crying yourself to sleep over the people you've killed here, so spare me the theatrics.

56182456306364e415006ab9_12.t: Garra's shoulders hunch in annoyance, but his weapon stays trained on you. He speaks through gritted teeth.
What do you want, Tang? I'm a little busy at the moment.

56182456306364e415006ab9_14.t: You can hear Garra's teeth gnashing from where you stand.
I don't see what that has to do with--

56182456306364e415006ab9_16.t: Yeah. Sure. Ngai wanted field testing for a pet project of his, so I gave it to him. So what? What Ngai wants is none of your damned business.

56182456306364e415006ab9_19.t: Garra glances at her nervously. Shifts his weight.
Tang... what the hell did you just do?

56182456306364e415006ab9_23.t: Garra glances at her nervously. Shifts his weight.
Tang... what the hell did you just do?

56182456306364e415006ab9_29.t: Garra barks out a harsh laugh.
Well, come on, then! Let's see what you've got.

56182456306364e415006ab9_30.t: I'm a man of my word. Why else would I be extending my hand to you?
He adjusts his hold on his gun.
I won't sugar-coat things: we're gonna push you around, first - enough to make HQ think that there was a struggle. But we won't kill anyone - I promise. You can trust me, one professional to another.

56182456306364e415006ab9_31.t: He spits on the floor again. Lets out a short laugh.
You owe me fifty nuyen, Hwang - they actually bought it! All personnel, open fire!

56182456306364e415006ab9_32.t: I guard the place, don't I? Of course I've seen what we've got living in those pods. I've seen 'em thrive, I've seen 'em squirm, and I don't give a damn this way or that.
He tilts his head to the side, and his neck lets out a rippling crack.
What they do in those labs isn't my business. All that I do is handle security.

56182456306364e415006ab9_33.t: Sleep? I don't miss a wink. In this life, you do what you have to in order to survive. Am I any less mercenary than you are?
Hell, no. I just get paid better.

54d5426a323437e81a005d05_1.t: The spirit peers at you through eyes as soft and undefined as poached eggs.

54d5426a323437e81a005d05_2.t: It raises its hands to examine them, blank eyes sweeping over dead flesh.

54d5426a323437e81a005d05_4.t: <I was... pushed out of my shop... hunted through alleys... I...>
The spirit's mouth widens in horror.
<Bao. Bao and his men. I wouldn't pay them... wouldn't accept their protection...>

54d5426a323437e81a005d05_5.t: A cold light flares from somewhere deep its throat.
<...They tore me apart... butchered me like a duck... they...>

54d5426a323437e81a005d05_10.t: The resonance of the words penetrates you. Scrapes at something inside you.

54d5426a323437e81a005d05_13.t: The spirit's spidery fingers twitch. They begin to curl, then taper, then blacken until they're a set of wicked-sharp hooks. The spirit looks at you expectantly.

54d5426a323437e81a005d05_15.t: The cold light flames even brighter. It gleefully shambles toward the unsuspecting triad soldiers.

54d5426a323437e81a005d05_16.t: The spirit's eyes roll in its head and it shudders, struggling to let the passion dissipate.
It squeezes its eyes shut as it struggles to remember.
<A smuggler... of... animals... He had a space... hidden... secret...>

54d5426a323437e81a005d05_17.t: The spirit clasps its head in its hands.
<A chute... a door... red paint...and numbers... 5-4-6-5... 5-4-6-5...>

54d5426a323437e81a005d05_18.t: The entity squeezes its eyes shut and turns away.

54d5426a323437e81a005d05_22.t: The spirit searches the sky for an answer.

54d5426a323437e81a005d05_24.t: His expression changes. Moves from lost to found.

54d5426a323437e81a005d05_25.t: It raises its hands to examine them, blank eyes sweeping over dead flesh.

55400d643234375820006888_0.t: The spirit's claws slice the air.

55400d643234375820006888_8.t: Its eyes become soft and indistinct again.

555ba1a5323431c01900164e_0.t: The shaman nods his head in gratitude.

555ba1a5323431c01900164e_1.t: But what are you doing in the Walled City at a time like this?
He looks you up and down, and his hand unconsciously rises to stroke his beard as his thoughts churn.

555ba1a5323431c01900164e_5.t: He looks uneasy, and shifts his weight from one foot to the other. After a moment, he cracks a small smile and sighs.
I suppose you're right, and I appreciate what you did for me. I'm Dimalanta. It's nice to meet you.

555ba1a5323431c01900164e_6.t: I don't mean t come off as rude. It's just...
I've been in the Walled City for some time. Everything here is so under the radar, and I needed to disappear.

555ba1a5323431c01900164e_8.t: His back stiffens at your comment. He looks anxious, and he sweeps hand over his short, dark hair.
I didn't realize word of my bounty was so easy to stumble across. Bad news for me.

555ba1a5323431c01900164e_9.t: No... more like a vice. I've made it my mission to brings down the corps. But with this bounty on my head, it's getting harder and harder to dodge the people who want to cash me in. That's why I'm here in this shithole of a city.

555ba1a5323431c01900164e_10.t: The corporations *have* to pay for what they've done.
He searches your face, his eyes pleading.

555ba1a5323431c01900164e_16.t: He shakes his head at you.
Why would you even do that? Why... oh, the hell with it. And the hell with you.

555ba1a5323431c01900164e_17.t: You can see his whale body relax as relief floods through him. He musters a tired smile.

555ba1a5323431c01900164e_18.t: Dimalanta sighs through gritted teeth. Fury boils within his eyes.
Doesn't sound like I have a choice. It's yours. Now get out of here - our deal's been fulfilled.

555ba1a5323431c01900164e_20.t: His brow furrows as he considers the question.

Now that you mention it, I noticed the locals acting sort of... off. Some are wandering around in a daze. Others are having tantrums. And a few of them were even wailing on officers like crazed animals. I thought they might just be pissed about their homes being invaded, but there's something in their eyes...

555ba1a5323431c01900164e_21.t: He clears his throat, breaking his statement.
No, it's probably nothing. City's under fire - people are probably just confused and lashing out. Still... be careful around the civilians. They're strung pretty tight right now.

5585d3103234310001000138_14.t: Is0bel jabs you with an elbow.
I've heard of this guy. Zhou Si is a human trafficker - people sell themselves to him to help their families. He's basically a glorified slave trader.

54bd54a5306364641300167d_0.t: The glamorous starlet flashes you a standard celebrity smile. Lovely, but emotionless.
Good evening. Penelope Wong... But, please, call me Penny.

54bd54a5306364641300167d_1.t: She lifts her drink and takes a tentative sip.
What brings you to our little soirée, Argyle? I don't believe I've seen you around the studio before.

54bd54a5306364641300167d_2.t: A smile lights up her face.
Oh, it was absolutely miraculous! I must admit, I nearly died of fright when I heard what happened. But to look at Neville now, you'd never guess he'd been hurt. Just miraculous.

54bd54a5306364641300167d_5.t: I've never stayed in a hospital, myself. Don't believe the paparazzi, either - my nose has never seen the knife. Is it very expensive? To undergo such miraculous treatments, that is.

54bd54a5306364641300167d_7.t: That's ridiculous! The studio's doing better than ever - we're even expanding! No money lost there.

54bd54a5306364641300167d_8.t: For a moment she's lost in thought, face twisted in concentration.
No, I don't think so. But... Neville *did* make some new friends while he was in Guangzhou.

54bd54a5306364641300167d_11.t: They seem to get on well. I'm a little sad he's never introduced us, though. She's supposed to make an appearance tonight. I'm very much looking forward to meeting her.

54bd54a5306364641300167d_12.t: Penelope's gaze drifts over your shoulder for a moment, and she smiles at someone behind you.
Oh, please excuse me. That's Mr. Yao, and I promised him I'd say hello tonight. Enjoy the party!

54bd54a5306364641300167d_16.t: She glances around to make sure no one else is listening, then leans toward you and lowers her voice.
I could do with a few less parties and public events, myself. The curse of popularity, I suppose... Sometimes I feel like I'm a prisoner of my own success.

54bd54a5306364641300167d_18.t: Your friends have nothing to worry about. I must admit, I nearly died of fright when I heard what happened. But to look at Neville now, you'd never guess he'd been hurt.

54bd54a5306364641300167d_20.t: We all are. I must admit, I nearly died of fright when I heard what happened. But to look at Neville now, you'd never guess he'd been hurt. It's miraculous, isn't it?

54bd54a5306364641300167d_21.t: She turns her head and chuckles politely.
He does seem to be that, doesn't he? I must admit, I nearly died of fright when I heard what happened. But to look at Neville now, you'd never guess he'd been hurt. It's miraculous, isn't it?

54bd54a5306364641300167d_23.t: A quizzical look crosses her face.
I do. But... how do you know about that?

54bd54a5306364641300167d_24.t: Oh! In that case, please, take my key fob. Just bring it back when you're done, okay?
She digs around her purse before producing a small plastic device, then hands it to you.

54bd54a5306364641300167d_25.t: Always happy to help where Neville's concerned.

54dba336653937cc15006955_1.t: The chef barks an order to his assistant searing fish, then whirls around, muttering fervently to himself. He stops short once he notices you standing in his kitchen.
I told them I needed an extra server, not a hobo. Shoo!
He gestures toward the door and returns to tasting an array of sauces.

54dbb4eb653937cc150069a2_0.t: The chef peers at you over a mountain of oysters.

54dbb4eb653937cc150069a2_1.t: He grabs a towel off a nearby rack and wipes his hands, grumbling to himself.
*I'm* head chef. I've little time to cook my food, and even less for conversation.

54dbb4eb653937cc150069a2_3.t: Do you have any idea how many orders I prepare?
Frustrated, he makes an exaggerated shrug.
I don't know where they go. I cook them, place them on this counter, and they disappear. Only time I care about who ordered what is if the dish is sent back with a complaint.

54dbb4eb653937cc150069a2_4.t: That's a polite way to put it. Gave two of my cooks broken ribs and a matching set of black eyes last time he stormed my kitchen.
Yes, I know that ork. Got a shellfish allergy he's overly keen on hounding us about. As though this wasn't the *top* seafood restaurant in the Sixth World.

54dbb4eb653937cc150069a2_5.t: He balks at your suggestion. After a moment's recovery, he looks straight at you, nostrils flared.
You can't possibly be saying what I think you are. You want me to... *poison* a diner? You're deranged! I'm calling security.

54dbb4eb653937cc150069a2_6.t: The chef nervously wrings his towel between his hands. Stares at the sumptuous plates of food waiting to be eaten. A glance over his shoulders. A shake of his head. And he smiles. A small, wry thing.
Y'know, he never appreciated our cuisine. Our *art.* I think a special thanks is in order. See yourself out, won't you?

54dbb4eb653937cc150069a2_7.t: The chef squares his shoulders and sucks in his breath.

You have some gall walking into my kitchen and telling me how to make my food. I am a *professional.* Sure, diners can be dicks. They can be horrible, wretched, shit-eating bottom crawlers. But the very idea of poisoning one of them and soiling my name is disgusting.

54dbb4eb653937cc150069a2_9.t: He flings his towel onto his shoulder and shifts his attention to a pot of boiling prawns.

54dbb4eb653937cc150069a2_10.t: The chef freezes at the implication in your words. Eyes scan your face, searching for any tell that might suggest you're bluffing.

54dbb4eb653937cc150069a2_11.t: Ah. A fellow epicure? I suppose I can make time for a fan all the way from... where is it you said? Seattle? Quite the trip you've made. What is it you need?

54dbb4eb653937cc150069a2_12.t: The chef looks up from his burners.
What more could you possibly want? I've already compromised my schedule once tonight on your behalf. I need you *out* of my workspace.

54dbb4eb653937cc150069a2_13.t: The chef spins around from his cutting board, a cleaver clutched loosely in his hand.
You again? Why are you still wasting my time?
He waves the knife in your direction.
You want a piece of this? No? Then get out!

54de4ef0653937a40b0001ff_4.t: From up on floor two? You're shitting me. Who put you up to this?
He furiously slams a wad of dough onto the table.

54de4ef0653937a40b0001ff_6.t: The chef presses flour-covered fingers into his temples.
Damnit. We need to get a handle on this. Has security been informed?

54de4ef0653937a40b0001ff_8.t: The chef continues to stare at the waiter. After a moment, he sighs.
If we lose our jobs because of this, I'm moving to Vegas.

550a053a306364fc1b000156_0.t: As you move through the MTR station, several figures move to interrupt your advance. The leader is obvious: a hulking brute of a troll. He cradles a heavy assault rifle in the crook of his cyberarm, and reeks of stale cigarettes and casual brutality. The name "Steeltooth" is stenciled across the flak vest beneath his jacket. His eyes narrow as you approach.

550a053a306364fc1b000156_1.t: That's far enough for you, punk.
Steeltooth gestures toward you with the barrel of his gun, taking a drag from his cigarette.
My crew's had a long night. Nerves a little raw, y'know? And crunching somebody's face always brightens my mood.

550a053a306364fc1b000156_2.t: Let me speak in small words, so you don't misunderstand.
He takes a long drag on his cigarette, exhaling the smoke through his nose.
Give us the prototype laser, or we're gonna kill you so hard your ancestors feel it.

550a053a306364fc1b000156_3.t: Steeltooth's face twists up in annoyance.
Hell with you, little man. You think you're so smart? Let's see how smart you are with a bullet in your skull.
His voice is like gravel over sheet metal.

550a053a306364fc1b000156_6.t: The troll doesn't even favor Wu with a glance.
Better keep your dog over there on a shorter leash, man, or he's likely to get put down.

550a053a306364fc1b000156_15.t: The troll takes one last drag from his cigarette before spitting the butt out onto the tiled floor.
Right. Cigarette's done, which means your time's up. Hand over the prototype. Now.

550a053a306364fc1b000156_17.t: What are you talking about? Don't be stupid.
The troll's shifting stance and wary eyes indicate the depth of his ability to lie - about the same as a puddle.

550a053a306364fc1b000156_18.t: Hey, shut up, okay?! Just... Shut up! I was doing legwork, and the suits weren't telling me nothing! So I had to get in and root around a bit, you know?
You wanna keep your arms, you don't tell anybody about that!

550a053a306364fc1b000156_19.t: Oh, I see. You wanna be a hard case, is that right? Fine.
The troll lifts his rifle, sneering down the barrel at you.

550a053a306364fc1b000156_20.t: Bullshit. Nobody dumps a payday like that. Not unless they got no other choice.
He fingers his rifle's trigger nervously, however.

550a053a306364fc1b000156_22.t: You kinda got a point there. Shit.
Steeltooth looks around nervously, hefting his gun.
You sure it had a tracker? You ain't lyin' to me?

550a053a306364fc1b000156_23.t: A look of comprehension breaks over the troll's face like a dim candle slowly flickering to life.
Come on, guys. Let's get the hell outa here!

550a053a306364fc1b000156_24.t: Whoa, whoa! Let's not be hasty here!
The troll is taken aback by your sudden fervor. He shrinks back, a bead of sweat rolling down his face.
Nobody needs to do any hand-breaking.

550a053a306364fc1b000156_25.t: Raising his hands placatingly, Steeltooth begins to back away slowly.
Message received, chief. I think it'd be best if we cleared out of here.

550a053a306364fc1b000156_26.t: You could try. Platform 6 is already painted with what's left of another team who didn't surrender. Turns out they didn't have the prototype. Maybe you do.

550a053a306364fc1b000156_27.t: The troll rolls his eyes, snorting in derision. His tone is sour and sarcastic.
'We should *talk* about this! We can be *friends*!' Listen to yourself. It's embarassing, you whining little baby.

55860475303031b027004d1b_7.t: The guard examines your passes. His eyes grow wide, and second later he howls into his comm.

5589c5563030313423004ddb_0.t: Sorry, but I can't let you past here - not unless you've checked in. Show your credentials at the counter to my right, and you're good to go. Otherwise...

55a2f552303031a41000808a_1.t: The guard lifts his commlink. After a moment, he speaks.
Got someone here saying they's a company consultant. We have anything like that scheduled?

55a2f552303031a41000808a_2.t: Yeah. Here at the labs. Should I give them clearance?

55a2f552303031a41000808a_3.t: Apparently we've had some security passes stolen recently.

55a2f552303031a41000808a_4.t: His hand flies to the gun at his side.

55a2f552303031a41000808a_5.t: Yeah... Okay. You're right. Sometimes security can be a little overkill here - I get it. Please, go right ahead.

55a2f552303031a41000808a_7.t: His uncertainty turns to anger, but he submits.
Damnit. You Lab Twelve people think you can do whatever you want, don't you? Just get on with your review already.

55a2f552303031a41000808a_10.t: The guard lifts his commlink. After a moment, he speaks.
Got someone here who left their ID at home. Anyone come through security like that? Yeah. Here at the labs.

55a2f552303031a41000808a_15.t: The guard lifts his commlink. After a moment, he speaks.
Got someone here saying they's with maintenance. We have anything like that scheduled?

55a2f552303031a41000808a_16.t: His uncertainty turns into an embarrassed chuckle.
Yeah... you're right. Between you and me, sometimes security can be a little overkill around here. Anyway, I won't hold you up. Good luck.

55a30148303031a4100082d0_0.t: The guard holds up his hand, all business.
Not a step farther. Everybody has to check in - no exceptions. Please do so immediately, or I'll have to escort you off the premises.

558f20f53234311c0f00323e_5.t: She manipulates the electrical panel in front of her and some lights flicker and fade from the display.

558f20f53234311c0f00323e_6.t: His voice takes on a scolding tone.

558f20f53234311c0f00323e_7.t: Yes, yes, of course. Rewiring it to unleash hell on the Tsang security forces would be a trivial matter - wouldn't take me five minutes.

55a0391430303108190000ca_0.t: She points her finger at you and speaks with a commanding tone.

55a0391430303108190000ca_2.t: Well, someone's on the ball. I hadn't even had a chance to call the janitors. I only *just* killed it, too. How did you...?

55a0391430303108190000ca_4.t: She pinches the bridge of her nose in frustration.
I don't need to know the details. You do what you have to do. Just get it OUT. I'll be waiting in one of the spare offices.

55a0391430303108190000ca_6.t: She pinches the bridge of her nose in frustration.

55a0391430303108190000ca_8.t: Well? What are you still doing here? Don't force me to remove you. I'm in an unpleasant mood, and it will only bring grief to the both of us.

55a0391430303108190000ca_9.t: The vice president looks up from her PDA to greet you, but stops.

55a0391430303108190000ca_10.t: I see what's happening here... you're a shadowrunner. And a shoddy one. Who do you think you're fooling with a costume change?

55a0391430303108190000ca_11.t: The vice president spares you a glance from over the top of her PDA. There's a bite to her voice.

55a0391430303108190000ca_14.t: The vice president fumbles with her PDA in alarm.

55a0391430303108190000ca_15.t: Her voice is calm, but biting.

55a0391430303108190000ca_17.t: Each syllable is stressed with a seething rage that sounds as if it's on the verge of explosion. Best to leave this woman to her work.

55a0391430303108190000ca_18.t: She slams a beaker onto the lab table. Her equipment shakes under the force.

5630016c643661b80f007eb8_1.t: You don't look like a cop.
He sniffs the air, his nostrils flaring.
Don't smell like one, either. So what are you doing here?

5630016c643661b80f007eb8_7.t: Nobu *fucking* Tashiro does *not* throw fights. I told them to get bent, and when we stepped into the ring, I beat their boy into paste. Been on the run ever since.

5630016c643661b80f007eb8_8.t: He pounds his chest with a closed fist.
But I've still got my pride.

5630016c643661b80f007eb8_9.t: Yeah, well, I wasn't about to let myself get pushed around. Not me, man. Not ever.
He pounds his chest with a closed fist.
I'm nobody's puppet. I've still got my pride.

5630016c643661b80f007eb8_10.t: Maybe. But at least I'm not a pawn in some triad bastard's game.
He pounds his chest with a closed fist.
I'm nobody's puppet. I've still got my pride.

5630016c643661b80f007eb8_12.t: Wait, wait, hold up. You've gotta get me out of here.

5630016c643661b80f007eb8_13.t: He licks his lips, nodding to himself.
You've, uh... you've gotta give me your visitor badge. I'll use it to get out, and I'll come back with help.

5630016c643661b80f007eb8_14.t: No, man, you don't get it. You *have* to give me your badge.

5630016c643661b80f007eb8_16.t: He slams the cage with both hands.
You'd better hope and pray that you never wind up in here with me, shitbird! I'll crack your skull open with my teeth!

5630016c643661b80f007eb8_17.t: You have to do it. Now give. Me. Your badge.

5630016c643661b80f007eb8_22.t: Keep walking, man. If you can't bust me out of here, you're wasting my time.

5525b55b30636400170026dc_2.t: Under Tang's skin, glowing tattoos writhe and change shape - tigers become cranes, and move on to dragons.

5525b55b30636400170026dc_13.t: Tang nods, running his palm over his forehead.

5525b55b30636400170026dc_24.t: You're being unfair, Is0bel. Our laws are for the good of the community.

5525b55b30636400170026dc_32.t: Tang extends his arms, palms up. As you watch, the tattoos therein shift into a complex mathematical formula.

5525b55b30636400170026dc_38.t: Tang is taken aback by the question. For a long moment, he says nothing. When his composure does return, he speaks deliberately and with great care.

We generally don't let the police into Whampoa Garden, it's true. But in this case we made an exception - the police were very polite and offered to look the other way over some of our deals with the Loho-Jowah Pirates.

5525b55b30636400170026dc_50.t: Tang cocks his head, confusion washing over his face.
A bladed weapon? How do you know?

5525b55b30636400170026dc_51.t: Tang looks to Ip and Ng, his mouth twisting down into a grimace.
This... complicates things. Take the key, then... But don't break anything, and don't shut off the servers.

5525b55b30636400170026dc_108.t: I can't believe we're even entertaining the notion that we have to defend ourselves. We should be disposing of this ghoul instead!
Tang narrows his eyes at you, hissing.

556e0b27323431681a000f44_1.t: The most vocal of the three, a female ork with an obvious cybereye, addresses you.

556e0b27323431681a000f44_5.t: NovaHott here is Allegiance's number-one superfan, in case you couldn't tell. Never mind the fact that their only current product, the Alpha, is woefully lackluster next to the competition.

556e0b27323431681a000f44_11.t: The ork gives you an appreciative nod.
Thanks for helping us settle that, stranger. Now, is there anything that we can do for you?

556e0b27323431681a000f44_25.t: See you around the show floor.

556e0b27323431681a000f44_28.t: Just a little good-natured ribbing, friend. Thanks for being a good sport about it.

556e0b27323431681a000f44_33.t: I think that you've earned your seat at the table, friend.

556e0b27323431681a000f44_36.t: Leave them alone, guys. they didn't ask to get sucked into this conversation.

5570e6b6323431541e005e1d_62.t: The decker's PDA flickers to life. A familiar face appears on the view screen.

55834c0d30303120180000a8_4.t: A muffled, annoyed voice shouts from the other side.

5584860f303031201800028f_4.t: The PDA rings, and a voice answers.

558b179d303031dc1f003e4e_0.t: The security captain studies his fingernail cuticles with quiet intensity. When you approach, he drones out a standard challenge.

558b179d303031dc1f003e4e_2.t: The security captain studies his fingernail cuticles with quiet intensity. He looks ready to drone out a standard challenge, but stops when he sees your maintenence uniform. He raises his weapon.

5594a808303031e011008b3b_2.t: That's *policy.* No one'd forget that. Unless... you're not who you say you are.

5594a808303031e011008b3b_5.t: Whoa, there's no need for that! Please, come in. If you could start with that desk in the back, we'd be awfully grateful.

5594a808303031e011008b3b_11.t: He begins to lower his gun, then freezes.

5594a808303031e011008b3b_12.t: That's *policy.* No one'd forget that. Unless... you're not who you say you are.

5594a808303031e011008b3b_13.t: He clicks the safety off on his gun.

5594a808303031e011008b3b_14.t: He clicks the safety off on his gun.

56313f916436617c180000d5_3.t: The constable's fist pistons out again, this time connecting with the bound man's side. You hear the gunshot crack of snapping ribs.

56313f916436617c180000d5_4.t: His jaw clenches, and he turns to face you, all trembling fury. His lip curls.

56313f916436617c180000d5_5.t: The sweating constable slaps a button on his desk terminal. Alarms begin to blare.

5632abe5643661fc130000bb_5.t: His fist pistons out again, catching the bound man in the sternum.

5632abe5643661fc130000bb_7.t: His eyes go wide at the sight of your drone. He makes a grab for his commlink.

Ghoul School, huh? Strange idea for a trid show. I guess that the kids will watch anything these days.

563a46753063643417003e71_16.t: The security guard's shotgun dips ever farther. He looks at Gaichu, and then the woman, and then back at Gaichu. He shakes his head and lowers his gun.

563a46753063643417003e71_20.t: The security guard's shotgun dips ever farther. He looks at Gaichu, and then the woman, and then back at Gaichu. He shakes his head and lowers his gun.

563a46753063643417003e71_25.t: The guard wearily shake his head.
I'm sorry, but you'll have to wait. The whole building's been placed under a strict security lockdown. Access between floors is restricted until we apprehend whoever triggered our alarms.

563a46753063643417003e71_31.t: He gives you a weary shrug.

563a46753063643417003e71_34.t: We wish - that would certainly help us out. All that we've been told is that the intruders are some sort of terrorists who've come to kidnap a Fuchi worker. 563a46753063643417003e71_42.t: The tired lines of the guard's face seem to deepen as he lets out a slow sigh.

Just like I've told this lady, I can't move until I'm relieved of duty or until the all-clear sounds. The only exception to that rule would be an emergency... like, if we were to spot the intruders, or if there were a fire that required an evacuation. Otherwise, I can't permit you to leave this floor. My apologies.

54d50fd23234372c680071a2_0.t: The street vendor gestures toward a jumbled pile of tarnished chains, costume jewelry, and trinkets on a stained flannel blanket.

54d50fd23234372c680071a2_3.t: The vendor's eyes narrow, and he glances over your shoulder before he speaks.
The Strangler's men are getting reckless. Too dangerous to do business in the old market now. I had to move shop.

54d50fd23234372c680071a2_5.t: Depends on how good a spot you had. Mine was good - people living deeper inside want pretty things, too, and no one else was selling 'em there.

54d50fd23234372c680071a2_6.t: He gives you the stink eye.

54d50fd23234372c680071a2_8.t: That's not something that someone would say around here.

54da9323323437d884007add_0.t: A bedraggled old woman looks up from her sewing at the sound of your approach.

54da9323323437d884007add_2.t: She locks eyes with you, nodding feverishly.

54da9323323437d884007add_3.t: Interesting? Here? No. Nothing changes here. Nothing changes.

Strangler Bao is the big man now. He is verrrry important. Verrrry impatient. You know Bao?

54da9323323437d884007add_5.t: Well, he requested a suit, and it took only one day longer than expected. The bastard refused to accept it!
You see your friend Bao, you tell him that he still owes me for my time. I don't sew for nothing! You can't eat air!

54da9323323437d884007add_7.t: You see that you do. Now. What else do you want?

54da9323323437d884007add_8.t: Me too! You know, he requested a special suit from me, and when I got it to him one day late, he wouldn't pay for it! I don't sew for nothing! You can't eat air!

54da9323323437d884007add_11.t: She cocks her head like a dog listening to a noise that it can't understand.
She sounds it out to herself.

54dbe235303031a019006c74_1.t: Their whispers are just within earshot.
Naw, I asked Crafty, and she said the same. Them dreams is bad.

54dbe235303031a019006c74_2.t: Think we'll lose them at sea? We're supposed to set out soon to make that delivery. What if they follow us?

54dbe235303031a019006c74_3.t: Eh, don't think so. Crafty said these things is just affecting right here for now.

Soon as we sail, dreams'll stop.

54dbe235303031a019006c74_4.t: The third sailor sees you, and taps her friends on the arms. They shoot upright. One examines his fingernails, another coughs loudly and begins to hum, and the last pretends she didn't see you. But when they sense your continued stare, the third speaks up.

54dbe235303031a019006c74_6.t: The three sailors' suspicions turn into smirks. One snickers to herself.
"Merchant," they says. That crook didn't so much as leave as he was chased off by Kindly. No sales permit. Not a big loss, though - the local shops have way better stuff than that smalltime hustler.

54dbe235303031a019006c74_8.t: They all exchange a look. The first sailor responds.
Right... And stay careful 'round these parts.

54dbe235303031a019006c74_9.t: You feel an uneasiness pass through the sailors.
Seems anyone who comes by these parts is having them.

54dbe235303031a019006c74_12.t: She runs the Five Phases. Smart girl. Might know a thing or two about this blight. You ask her, and she may have somethin' more to say.

54dbe235303031a019006c74_14.t: Yeah, my eyes might be goin', but my ears is still good. This landy thinks we're a pack of idiots.

54dbe235303031a019006c74_15.t: The second sailor raises his hands to lessen the tension.

You landies think of us sailors as a superstitious bunch. That may be, but not a one of you can say we've imagined these dreams. It's happening right and left without discrimination. You have yourself a word with Crafty over at the Five Phases, and get yourself educated on this blight before calling us seafaring folks fools. Ya hear?

54dbe235303031a019006c74_18.t: One of the sailors turns toward you.
You have questions 'bout them dreams, you go ask Crafty. She runs the Five Phases. Smart girl. Might know a thing or two about this blight.

5578c5833234318018008611_0.t: Is0bel takes a quick glance at the terminal.
I'll be damned. It's logged into an admin inbox, and somebody left it unlocked. I can't open the door for you from here, but we can read the messages if you want.

5578c5833234318018008611_7.t: Huh. I don't know what I was expecting this message to be, but that wasn't it. You want me to keep going...?

5578c5833234318018008611_18.t: She steps back away from the terminal.

5666003b6436613c12000635_9.t: Okay! Okay, fine... that's great. It's your idea. Goodbye!

5666003b6436613c12000635_13.t: He studies the balance on his credstick with a smile.

5666003b6436613c12000635_15.t: He licks his lips, his eyes locked on your credstick.

5666003b6436613c12000635_16.t: All right. Whatever. I never saw you.

5666003b6436613c12000635_20.t: The PDA's speakers click as the line connects.

5666003b6436613c12000635_23.t: No, I don't think so. You shouldn't be wandering around the building.

5666003b6436613c12000635_24.t: You aren't supposed to be here. You're an intruder!
He grabs his PDA and begins furiously dialing.

55367aab3234377c22007a88_1.t: Ah yes, the new-on-the-scene runner! Nnn-nnn...

55367aab3234377c22007a88_2.t: She smiles, giggling to herself a bit and hums her little hum.

55367aab3234377c22007a88_4.t: Xiaozhi's eyes widen with the joy of her job and she hums her little hum.

55367aab3234377c22007a88_6.t: Unfortunately, the deluxe package is no longer for sale - nor is any information about him. So sorry!

55367aab3234377c22007a88_10.t: Lee Tai-lung's client. I believe you know the company.

55367aab3234377c22007a88_13.t: Xiaozhi fumbles with her fingers a bit more. She can't make eye contact with you.

55367aab3234377c22007a88_20.t: Xiaozhi fumbles with her fingers a bit more. She can't make eye contact with you.

55367aab3234377c22007a88_22.t: Xiaozhi fumbles with her fingers a bit more. She can't make eye contact with you.
And all I need to do is make sure you don't walk out of here alive.

55367aab3234377c22007a88_26.t: I would love to! Absolutely love to. But unfortunately, I received another offer... a better offer... Nnn-nnn... to take it off the market... just before you arrived.

55367aab3234377c22007a88_27.t: You are very kind to say so. Nnn-nnn... Yes, very very kind.

55367aab3234377c22007a88_29.t: Oh yes, I am! I definitely am! Nnn-nnn...
Xiaozhi's eyes widen with the joy of her job and she hums her little hum.
Very timely intel. Verrry timely. I have his complete, up-to-the minute itinerary! Where he'll be, who he'll be with, security coverage - the deluxe dackage.

5581d35e3234375439001ad9_1.t: The thing's voice comes out in a hollow rasp. Something about it feels empty.

5581d35e3234375439001ad9_4.t: Ah, a man of action. Good.

5581d35e3234375439001ad9_8.t: Slowly, painfully, the mummy inclines its head. It reaches into the folds of its robes and produces a ring of fired porcelain. The creature extends its arm, presenting the object as an offering.

5581d35e3234375439001ad9_13.t: When I am free, I will give you a thing. A token. Crumble it in your hands, and I will come to your aid... but only once. One time, and no more.

5581d35e3234375439001ad9_15.t: I will be forever in your debt.

5581d35e3234375439001ad9_17.t: The mummy's eyeless sockets seem to stare into you. Through you.

5581d35e3234375439001ad9_18.t: ...You don't. How could you? But I am a man of my word.

55aff6d0306364c414007270_0.t: This austere, refined-looking elf is browsing the shop's collection of telesma, herbs, and crystals. Noting your approach, he turns to face you.

55aff6d0306364c414007270_1.t: His lips quirk upward in a slight smile.
Indeed. With so much misery and pain only meters away, permeating the Walled City, 'worse' is a quality that is quite tangible here in Heoi. I do not envy those trapped within those boundaries.

55aff6d0306364c414007270_2.t: My name is Aljernon Half-Dream - and it is a pleasure to make your acquaintance.

55aff6d0306364c414007270_4.t: No? I am not, I admit - though I have been to Hong Kong many times in the past. I was acquainted with Miao's mother, Eleanor.

55aff6d0306364c414007270_6.t: There's a leaden finality to Aljernon's tone. He pauses for a moment before elaborating.

55aff6d0306364c414007270_8.t: Such a waste of human potential. To think of all of the ways the world and fate have failed those people...

55aff6d0306364c414007270_12.t: What makes you think I am either of them? Perhaps I am simply an inquisitive soul.

55aff6d0306364c414007270_15.t: The elf spreads his hands placatingly.

My apologies. I assumed that you were interesting in conversation, since you approached me. If I was mistaken, I am sorry for giving offense. Perhaps it's the proximity of the Walled City, but many in Heoi are quite...prickly.

55aff6d0306364c414007270_16.t: The elf cocks his head, considering the question.

55aff6d0306364c414007270_17.t: Hello again, my friend. Was there something else I could assist you with?

563e75203063645422006cab_2.t: Welcome back. What can I do for you?

563e75203063645422006cab_4.t: Danny nods, rocking back and forth on his heels.

563e75203063645422006cab_5.t: Danny plows ahead, deadpan voice never once betraying a hint of emotion.

563e75203063645422006cab_8.t: Danny cocks his head, looking genuinely confused.

563e75203063645422006cab_9.t: Oh. Wait... You must mean my voice.

563e75203063645422006cab_11.t: Danny nods, and the barest hint of a smile graces his lips.

I goblinized, and my brother didn't - so the non-Japanese branches of Fuchi are okay with him being an executive. My mom always seems to think that I resent him for it, but why would I? He's making all that money in a big, boring office, and I get to be down here. Interacting with customers. Isn't that great?

563e75203063645422006cab_13.t: They're not letting anyone out of the building unless they have executive clearance. Something about a security situation...

563e75203063645422006cab_14.t: Spanecki looks at you for a long moment, and then begins glancing between you and Lily.

563e75203063645422006cab_15.t: She's tired and needs a nap, doesn't she? Children get so tired when you spend all day shopping. She must be getting irritable.

563e75203063645422006cab_22.t: Danny pauses, glancing toward the door at the back of the room.
There might be another way out through the service hallways. But I couldn't unlock the door. Against regulations.

563e75203063645422006cab_24.t: Danny's eyes widen, and he fishes around in his pocket to produce a battered plastic keycard.

Two hundred and fifty? Wow. I guess I'll be able to have a nice night out on the town this weekend. Video bowling, karaoke, and maybe a trip to that nice Indian place my brother likes. Thanks a bunch.

563e75203063645422006cab_25.t: Danny considers this for a moment, and then fishes around in his pocket to produce a battered plastic keycard.
Well. I suppose that you have a point there. Just don't burn anything down, okay?

552f062b323431e41b0069fa_53.t: She smiles through Is0bel's outburst, ignoring her.

553548f0323431f0110041bc_15.t: The woman grows agitated. You can see a glimmer of desperation in her eyes.

553548f0323431f0110041bc_34.t: Her expression clouds, but only for a moment.

5570e6b6323431541e005e1d_63.t: He brings up his wrist to stare at the screen, a frown etched onto his face.

5570e6b6323431541e005e1d_66.t: ...Yeah, all right. Tell her sorry, I didn't think this would take so long.

5570e6b6323431541e005e1d_95.t: You become dimly aware of a figure looming behind you in the convention hall.

56300414643661b80f007ee7_3.t: I can't say... it wasn't my doing. Not my doing!

56300414643661b80f007ee7_4.t: The madman rattles his cage door.

56300414643661b80f007ee7_6.t: He lurches forward and slaps both palms onto his cell door.

56300414643661b80f007ee7_8.t: He lowers his voice to a whisper.

56300414643661b80f007ee7_9.t: Something about your words seems to calm him. The erratic, jittery quality of his voice smooths itself out.

56300414643661b80f007ee7_11.t: He cradles your offering in his hands, crooning.

56300414643661b80f007ee7_12.t: What? Sparkles? Then it must be truly blessed!

56300414643661b80f007ee7_14.t: A shame, my friend. A dismal shame. Please, come back to me if you find my salvation... any kind of stimulant will do!

56300414643661b80f007ee7_16.t: And you are not bad yourself!

563e8d70643661b00e001344_1.t: Lam glances down at you, frowning.

563e8d70643661b00e001344_4.t: He turns away, peering down the darkened hallway ahead of you.

54d3f034323437f057003738_14.t: You don't talk to us again, understand? Try to pass by my boys, and we'll punch holes in you until daylight shines through.

54d3f034323437f057003738_16.t: man, you don't listen, do you?

54d3f034323437f057003738_17.t: No. I don't think so. You don't get near Strangler Bao.

54f6495b30636444130071ba_3.t: The Knight Errant guard stands silently for a moment, but eventually replies.

556e0b27323431681a000f44_3.t: Her voice is surprisingly deep and brassy.

556e0b27323431681a000f44_13.t: Hey, join the club. Between travel arrangements and the transorbital flight out here, I'm a little behind on current events.

556e0b27323431681a000f44_27.t: Do yourself a favor and cozy up to Harridan. I'm sure that you two are gonna get along *just* fine.

556e0b27323431681a000f44_29.t: Do yourself a favor and cozy up to Harridan. I'm sure that you two are gonna get along *just* fine.

55a42c0262366554070070c2_18.t: Your loaded question sends the elf into a fit of nervousness.
I-I, ah... It's not common, b-but sometimes, under the right conditions, um... We know some people, you see... The Walled City is just in such a mess right now - we need a break.

55a42c0262366554070070c2_19.t: Your observation sends the elf into a fit of nervousness.
R-running? No. Well, sort of. The Walled City's under a lot of stress. We just want a break, is all... But running? No. I'm not sure why you'd think that...

55bf23983830632c1000388a_1.t: I am the temporary merchant representative until a permanent replacement is assigned.

55bf23983830632c1000388a_11.t: The puppet's eyes flicker. Emotion seems to break through for a moment.

55bf23983830632c1000388a_12.t: I am the temporary merchant representative until a permanent replacement is assigned.

564cf2b66436611c0f00324f_13.t: A few seconds pass. Finally, the constable half-shrugs and jerks his thumb back over his shoulder.

54cfe6ba306364a06a008597_1.t: No restaurant service tonight. The kitchen staff's too busy with the party to serve anyone. Wish I could get onto that balcony...

54cfe6ba306364a06a008597_7.t: You *need* to see it. It's the best show on trideo. Ever!

54cfe6ba306364a06a008597_8.t: What? You *need* to see it. It's the best show on trideo. Ever!

54cfe6ba306364a06a008597_9.t: Are you kidding? There are tons of trid stars out there! Man, I'd love to get my picture taken with Derek Yuen or Wing Mak-Lam. They're in Promises in Moonight. You... know the show, right?

54cfe6ba306364a06a008597_10.t: Guests only. The guy throwing it seems connected to the trid industry. There are tons of actors in there - some of them from Promises in Moonlight.

54cfe6ba306364a06a008597_11.t: I'm *this* close to hoofin' it to a noodle shop.

54dd4f1c653937e81300425c_1.t: Hold it right there. This is a private room. You'd best back your ass through that door, or I'll paint you red.

More teeth than a croc, and a face so ugly it could churn a troll's stomach. The Talon leers at you from across the room, muscles tense and ready to spring at the first sign of resistance. Though something tells you he's more apt to make the first move. He speaks to you again, voice deep and dry.
Ya deaf? I told you to *get out* before I wreck you!

54dd4f1c653937e81300425c_7.t: The Talon flexes. His abnormal frame looks larger than ever. A half-smile crawls up his unscarred cheek.
You got it, Boss. Food was shit anyway.

54e4ced9343061c011000f9d_2.t: Through leaking eyes, the Talon homes in on Rooster.
You little shit. Dragging me to this restaurant over and over... Making me eat filth, or watch you stuff your goddamn face full of it. And now, here you are, turned traitor in blink.

54e4ced9343061c011000f9d_4.t: The laugh punches the air. Talon's lips curve into a clumsy smile, eyes gleaming.

You won't get shit from the 289s. In fact, if your new allies don't gut you, the triad will. Make sure you don't go squawking to anybody 'bout high-level plans or secrets or whatever. A flea like you won't last the night.

54e4ced9343061c011000f9d_7.t: Without hesitation, the Talon takes a step forward and spits on the ground.

To hell with you, you spineless bit pusher. I'll bet you didn't even put up a fight. Just rolled over and played the captive. Coward! I'm going to enjoy planting a bullet in your soft, worthless skull.

54e4ced9343061c011000f9d_10.t: The Talon homes in on Rooster.
You little shit. Dragging me to this restaurant over and over... Making me eat filth, or watch you stuff your goddamn face full of it. And now, here you are, turned traitor in blink.

54ebb94f306364901b001373_0.t: The powerful troll watches you impassively as you approach, her expression unchanging.

54ebb94f306364901b001373_3.t: The troll eyes you impassively, taking a long time to ponder before speaking.
250 nuyen, and I tell you everything I know.

54ebb94f306364901b001373_4.t: The vendor pockets the credstick without even looking at it.

54ebb94f306364901b001373_13.t: I don't know what they're doing out in Ho Chung, and I don't really care so long as I don't get shot at. Looked like a protection detail, though. I didn't catch how many there were, but it was less than ten. They're well-geared, but they didn't look like they had anything heavier than rifles or a grenade launcher.

54ebb94f306364901b001373_14.t: The troll thinks, and then nods enthusastically.
All right, you've got yourself a deal.

5524163d306364fc100003f7_0.t: The chef looks up from his pot of boiling water, red-faced and sweating. A name tag is pinned to his lapel: Chef Victor Kang.
Thought I told them to send in the waiter. Who the hell are you?

5524163d306364fc100003f7_2.t: Yeah, I could do that... And I could also lose my job for it. Even go to jail. Sounds like a real winner of a proposition to me.
He strains a vat of boiled fish through a sieve.
Got work to do, stranger. Door's that-a way.

5524163d306364fc100003f7_3.t: Yeah. Cost me a raise and a whole lot of face. I'll bet that bastard didn't lose a wink of sleep over it, either.
With single motion, the chef lops off a fish's head.

5524163d306364fc100003f7_4.t: He grabs a plastic tab from his apron pocket and tosses it to you.
Ruin him, will you? Or at the very least, ruin his day. I'll consider it a bonus if you wreck his anemic girlfriend and giddy starlet's days, too.

5524163d306364fc100003f7_5.t: ...Ku Feng. That's it. She's the rich wench who paid for Ma's hospital stay. Skinny, anemic thing. Never eats. All she ever orders is cheap, red wine. First I thought it was a fling. But now... I'm not so sure. Maybe you can split 'em up. I'd thank you for it.

5524163d306364fc100003f7_6.t: A warm, salty wine? What a disaster. No, she just orders wine. Plain ol' wine. Wouldn't stop her from slipping in her own seasonings, though.

5525b45c30636400170026af_5.t: Perhaps. Let me see it, and I'll tell you what I can find out.
Wing-Kei holds the armor piece up to her eye, taking out a jeweler's loupe to look at it more closely.
Hmm. Japanese markings. I don't recognize all of them, but this first one is "Renraku" - fairly recognizable to anyone who's used to seeing the name in hanzi.

5525b45c30636400170026af_8.t: Wing-Kei hands the armor piece back to you.

Whoever shot this off the owner came loaded with the right kind of weaponry to get the job done, that's for certain. And you don't carry that kind of ordnance around unless you're sure of what you're facing - it's just too expensive for common carry.

555a61da323431501900164e_1.t: We're f-finally here... finally past... the trash heap that... encrusts this place.

He reaches out and touches a duraplast wall. The paint has long since chipped away, but what remains is enough to tell you that you're looking at the original exterior of Kowloon Walled City. It looks much sturdier than the ramshackle construction that has grown up around it.

555a61da323431501900164e_5.t: Even this... is a n-nightmare n-now... decrepit and rotten and falling apart.
It was supposed to be a g-good place... a s-safe place.

555a61da323431501900164e_7.t: He looks down on her, expressionless.
Yes. And that is why I have to f-fix it.

555a61da323431501900164e_9.t: He reaches a hand toward you, pulls it back with a pained expression.

555a61da323431501900164e_32.t: Yes... yes, of c-course you do... it's... in your nature. You are... who you are. I have to accept that.

5570c85e3234313c1d004418_2.t: The older of the two guards, a middle-aged man with a pompadour haircut, struggles with all his might to keep his prisoner's flailing arm constrained.
Don't let her go, Ho-yee! She has the strength of ten men!

5570c85e3234313c1d004418_4.t: The security captain locks eyes with Is0bel. He barks out an order.

5570c85e3234313c1d004418_22.t: The man strains against the troll's drunken efforts. His brow is beaded with sweat.

5570c85e3234313c1d004418_34.t: A deafening crackle of static from the intercom system draws the attention of everyone on the show floor. A second later, you hear the Security Captain's voice in glorious stereo, the intercom sounding in one ear and your PDA's earpiece in the other.
Oh, shit! Take her down! Take them both down!

5570c85e3234313c1d004418_35.t: As a matter of fact... aaaah!

DAMN YOU! Keep your fingers to YOURSELF! And you, dwarf... you DO answer to me!

5570c85e3234313c1d004418_36.t: Security has the final say on all who CAN and CAN'T be on this floor!

Now TELL ME WHAT YOU'RE DOING HERE, or you're GOING TO REGRET IT!

54bd7aa03063648803001766_0.t: The partygoer raises an eyebrow at your approach.

They're serving century-old Cabernet like punch here. It's hard to believe, considering how much a single bottle costs. But it's even harder to believe Mr. Ma's hosting this party. And so soon after his accident.

54bd7aa03063648803001766_1.t: Not *literally.* But he might as well be the way he sprang back after being t-boned at 140 klicks an hour.

54bd7aa03063648803001766_4.t: Isn't that why we're all here? To be famous, become famous, or make someone else famous?

54bd7aa03063648803001766_6.t: He catches sight of someone across the room and waves.

54da5dae306364a88e0035e1_22.t: The caller's face is obscured and their voice digitized, but can still feel a sense of cold threat from the caller.
you are in possession of data and tissue samples from Project Omega Sequence #358 G. Those samples are not your property, and if you attempt to keep them, we will be forced to take action.

54de4ef0653937a40b0001ff_0.t: An alarmed waiter in a tussled uniform stumbles into the kitchen.
Chef! We have a problem. A *big* problem.

54de4ef0653937a40b0001ff_2.t: He glances out the kitchen door.
Couple of prawns ended up in the ork's dish. Only thing worse than his allergy is his temper, and he's on his way down here!

54de4ef0653937a40b0001ff_7.t: The frazzled waiter's back stiffens in response.
Oh! Y-yes, sir! But we're so understaffed today that they're struggling to contain it...

54de4ef0653937a40b0001ff_10.t: With a deep breath, the waiter regains his composure.
Our second floor guest is becoming impatient. Where is his food?

54ebb55b306364901b001311_0.t: This street vendor is hawking obviously cheap junk he probably bought in bulk from an outlet. Charms, trinkets, and small toys litter his stall. He waves his arms excitedly, drawing you over.
Hey, friend! Friend! Come, look at my wares! Many fine souvenirs for you!

54ebb55b306364901b001311_2.t: The junk vendor leans back against his stall, tilting his chin upward.
Maybe I have, maybe I haven't. What can you do for me, hmm?

54ebb55b306364901b001311_4.t: The vendor greedily snatches the credstick from your palm, turning it over and caressing it like a raccoon with a shiny coin.
Yes, good, good! Thank you very much, my friend.

54ebb55b306364901b001311_6.t: The junk vendor goes back to organizing his shop, nodding in your direction.
Anyone starts shooting, keep it away from my stall, eh? I don't want any trouble.

54ebb55b306364901b001311_7.t: The junkman shrinks back against his booth.
Okay, okay! You don't have to do that, I'll talk!

54ebb55b306364901b001311_8.t: The vendor eyes you warily, picking a few bits of stray food from his beard.
Maybe I can help you. But how can you help me, eh?

553be52362366664310001a8_4.t: Oh, yeah. We're fishing for assholes.

553be52362366664310001a8_7.t: Their spokesman laughs, looks at his crew.
Hey, you talk good Cantonese, baby. Real authentic.

553be52362366664310001a8_8.t: Actually, you just told me you're gonna crap a gun.

553be52362366664310001a8_10.t: The smuggler squints at Wu's badge, then smiles at his friends.

553be52362366664310001a8_11.t: Their spokesman laughs, looks at his crew.

556e3197323431a011001ae4_1.t: She slows her speech to a crawl.

5570c85e3234313c1d004418_3.t: You recognize her as the guard who was standing by the employee entrance on the show floor. How she got roped into troll-hauling duty is anyone's guess.

5570c85e3234313c1d004418_16.t: ...Look, just hurry back to the kitchen and get out of our hair.

5570c85e3234313c1d004418_26.t: Her hand moves towards her weapon.

5585d3103234310001000138_1.t: As he tries to pull away, his mouth drops open. You can see that he's missing at least half of his teeth.

5585d3103234310001000138_2.t: Can't let them find me... can't let them catch me... have to hide from them, from *her*...
Slowly, methodically, he begins to claw at his own eyes.

5585d3103234310001000138_3.t: Can't get free. Can't get c-c-clean. When my eyes close, I see them there, twitching, *shaking* like broken things.
He reaches for you with bloodstained fingers.

5585d3103234310001000138_6.t: He nods, staring at you through red-streaked eyes.
Drooling fire and pissing blood. Bodies like the gums of some huge animal. Teeth thrusting out of pink flesh like the thorns on a rose. Shaking... trembling... and their horrible smiles...

5585d3103234310001000138_16.t: W-we all did it. To try to keep her away. Just like in the stories.
It didn't work. And I d-didn't have the courage to cut out my t-t-tongue.

5585d3103234310001000138_17.t: Th-they came for us. The t-t-trembling things.
I had to do it. They were making too much noise. I didn't have a choice!

54ebc158306364901b0015b7_0.t: This street vendor is hawking both traditional chinese medical supplies and modern trauma kits alike.

54d50af63234372c68007117_0.t: A tubby man with a twice-broken nose glances up at you from a pile of gun parts. He offers you a gap-toothed smile.

54d50af63234372c68007117_3.t: Got Bao's permission to sell weapons in this stall. Been sellin' a lot of 'em - even more than usual.

54d50af63234372c68007117_5.t: If you're an organlegger, or a gunrunner, or a triad, there sure-as-shit is. Otherwise, you're looking at a hand-to-mouth, meal-to-meal existence here.

54d50af63234372c68007117_6.t: He sifts through the gun parts laid out in front of him.
You got cash, I can help you.

554d16ed323431b417000f5b_0.t: Malvina's voice comes ripping out of the Rat King in an imperious shriek.
Going?! You aren't *going* anywhere! You will all remain here as my SERVANTS, or you will FEED THE RATS!

554d5b71323431f8180000ab_5.t: The creature leans forward, into the light. A fine-featured face with high cheekbones and piercing eyes stares down at you; the carpet of living vermin that bury the rest of Malvina's head and neck struggle and shriek.
Our new body is BEAUTY ITSELF. Unity of BIOLOGY, and UNITY OF PURPOSE.

554d69dc323431f81800014b_4.t: Malvina's cultured voice is overtaken by the inhuman roars of the other things that share her body.
WE WILL REND YOU ALL TO PIECES! TEAR YOUR FLESH TO SHREDS!

554d6bf5323431f81800017e_1.t: Malvina opens her mouth to speak, but you'll never know what she was going to say. The only sound that escapes from her throat is a long, ragged scream. 556e2a46323431bc19001ad9_5.t: The troll snickers in amusement. He gives Gaichu a condescending smile.
Yeah, pal. Sure it is. That's what I love about you cosplayers... you can never bring yourselves to admit when you're wrong.

556e2a46323431bc19001ad9_6.t: He turns to you as Gaichu bristles.

556e2a46323431bc19001ad9_7.t: His badge hangs low on his lanyard. You catch a glimpse of his decking handle: HeadSpace.

What's wrong with you now, you stupid thing?

5693de1c3063641c0e0012f0_2.t: The Fuchi employee blinks a few times, taken aback at the offer. After a moment, she tosses you the kettle.

5693de1c3063641c0e0012f0_4.t: The employee cautiously fills the teakettle and places it back on its base. Within seconds, the thing is bubbling away in front of her, and she nods in satisfaction. She doesn't even turn back around.

5693de1c3063641c0e0012f0_7.t: A tour? Of service corridors and break rooms? Yeah, right.

You'd better get out of here *right now*, or I'm--

5693de1c3063641c0e0012f0_9.t: The woman looks like she's about to say something cutting to the man watching the trid, but she merely bites her lower lip in frustration.
*Fine.* Hang out here, I don't care. Just don't spill anything, okay?
With that, she turns back to the teakettle to fume in silence.

5693de1c3063641c0e0012f0_12.t: The woman on break folds her arms over her chest, squinting at you. If she's noticed Lily's overacting, it certainly doesn't register in her expression.
And you couldn't just buy a bottle in one of the convenience stores out there? C'mon, pal. Get the hell out of here before I throw you out.

54e2771c653937bc1600027f_2.t: The two guards exchange a look, then turn back to Rooster, smiling.

54e2771c653937bc1600027f_6.t: No ink, no suits... You one of them runners?

54e2771c653937bc1600027f_7.t: Shit - a runner? Don't let them take off with Rooster!

54e39226653937d419000f48_0.t: Your commlink clicks. A burst of static, then the sound clears to a reveal a soft voice.

54e39226653937d419000f48_2.t: Another burst of static, and Pei-Lon continues.

54e39226653937d419000f48_3.t: One last thing. I may be the driver, but this ain't my rig. Door's locked and I don't know the code. You may have to break in. Good luck, and get moving.

55836a34303031981700307b_2.t: No chance. Rotation's over, and I'm taking my three-day break. But, hey, word of advice: make it a habit to check in with the boss early. She *hates* it when people are late. And with how much she enjoys pointing that finger... Stay on her good side.

55836a34303031981700307b_3.t: Yeah. Don't fuck up. You're at Tsang, now. Not even our god-awful boss will tolerate anything less than your best. 55a9aacb303031b0180030b0_1.t: His blinks in confusion, but then seems to decide on something, and nods his head.

55a9aacb303031b0180030b0_2.t: At your words, he seems to relax. He glances at your passes, hardly long enough to read anything, and returns his gaze to you.

565f332762663208210043d4_8.t: Perceptive. I like that. Captain Utama is waiting for you below decks. In your place, I would not keep her waiting long.

565f332762663208210043d4_12.t: They will wait for you in that rusted hulk that you call a home. The one that the corporate people towed here.

54eb5a713234375428006eab_1.t: I don't want any trouble, boss.

555a76a5323431800800153f_4.t: His eyes dart from ganger to ganger before coming back to rest on the Red Pole.

555a76a5323431800800153f_6.t: He raises his hands. Bows his head.

555a76a5323431800800153f_9.t: The shaman calls out to you.

555a76a5323431800800153f_17.t: Why do you think? Gear, man. If you think that *I'm* worth robbing, just imagine what you can pull off of *him!*

5568f77f323431581b00491d_9.t: I know how to keep us safe. I saw how to do it.

5568f77f323431581b00491d_10.t: You're crazy, man. Keep away from me - I mean it!

5568f77f323431581b00491d_12.t: This is for the best, Yang. Trust me. I'll do you first, and then I'll do me.

556d2c843234316c180010b2_2.t: Yes, but not for free. You do me a favor, and this uniform...

5570c85e3234313c1d004418_1.t: The troll's voice comes out in an inebriated roar.

...Theesh DREKHEADSH want me to leave! Becaush I'm a TROLL!

5585b49c62663288150060d1_11.t: The transient stares down at the fallen man's body, her brow furrowed.

55a7e9de6236664014000aa4_8.t: The man stares at the scene around him, bewildered.

56393981306364d40d007911_7.t: The technician across the table raises his hand.

554d6bf5323431f81800017e_7.t: I don't know what you just did, but whatever it was, it worked. Those rat... things... turned on Malvina's loyalists.

555a7a24323431800800159c_1.t: You! You DROP YOUR GUNS and GET DOWN ON THE FLOOR!

...DROP EVERYTHING, or we'll GUT YOU LIKE PIGS!

555a7a24323431800800159c_2.t: She gestures wildly with her rifle. A thin stream of blood traces its way from her left nostril down to her mouth.

555a7a24323431800800159c_4.t: She gestures wildly with her rifle. A thin stream of blood traces its way from her left nostril down to her mouth.

Had enough of kicking the hornets today? My radio sounds like a whole nest of them is after you.

560efedf643661880e003a1b_7.t: The SDU mage's amplified voice rolled lazily out of his speakers.

5693de1c3063641c0e0012f0_8.t: Another Fuchi employee - a store manager of some kind - glances over his shoulder and hisses at the woman by the teakettle.

555fcd8f323431e819001e3a_7.t: BACK AWAY! Back the FUCK away!

555fcd8f323431e819001e3a_9.t: This is for your OWN GOOD! We are here to PROTECT YOU!

560efedf643661880e003a1b_6.t: Please, you're not listening! We had no choice!

5512fe7a6539372010004d1b_1.t: On behalf of Wuxing, Inc., we've been instructed to prevent your further vandalizing of the company's property and assets. However, they never specified how. So I vote we do this the easy way.
